Nos contestó mal como si fuera el dueño. Se creen la gran cosa. No recomiendo para nada","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elvis Ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiUP_of90lfwCCUNLWEILzHfH2OqhSUCRktUYldaMISZu2qEtAZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ayer fuimos con unos amigos ala disco
Y estábamos hablando con mis amigos y de la nada nos saca de la disco el seguridad ese y luego no nos dejaron entrar y los 2 que estaban en la entrada uno de lentes y otro que parece rumano nos dice que nosotros queríamos robar la excusa que nos dio y si no sos conocido de los de ahí no te dejan entrar ni nada.
Asquerosos esas personas..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jorge Villca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlGjNnDa2vVXYXoTwXIcHYIcfIThOHeC93Hr6tlUcHNde-cQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La verdad es que entras solo si te conocen, al parecer... Pero bueno, está feo que no te dejen entrar viniendo de recomendaciones de otra gente.
Quise entrar con una amigo y antes de nosotros habían 4 chavales a quienes les estaban pidiendo el DNI y no tenían pinta de tener una reserva, pero si les iban a dejar entrar, al menos parecía eso, ya que sino, no les hubieran pedido el DNI ¿No?. A la hora de preguntar si podía entrar, me negaron completamente... En fin. Esperaba pasármelo bien la verdad.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beatriz fresno lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4t5fO8ocHU-DJwroMt93fQD1_M511bHYCpq857U0IYcUEZKV3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Empezemos por lo bueno, iba con miedo de que la música fuera mala, pero no, la discoteca en eso estuvo bien. Solo en eso porque, lo malo? Bueno empezemos con el robo de dinero con el cambio de las entradas con la botella, no lo explicaré, solo diré que para esa mierda de botella me iba al mercadona a comprarme 4 botellas y la bebida, después la famosa mesa en el medio de la discoteca, osea no se como una discoteca  pone una mesa en el medio de la pista de baile, si se hubiera roto la botella? Seguro que ni lo rebolsarian y para terminar el personal, para mi conocí a un guardia y fue muy majo, muy amable, pero hay un señor que de verdad no debería ni de trabajar ahí, si no les gusta de lo que trabajan váyanse no por eso tengan que joder a los demás, que cuesta poner una sonrisa o escuchar a los clientes aunque pongas cara de asco, la atencion al cliente es un asco pero si no pueden no trabajen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arantxa Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXENeVJ-A-1KKZvTbnOU8hpOzWaI1vJgKyTlmirNe_N7vi-DkkRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Si quieres pasar un buen rato con tu pareja, ni vayas. Would definitely recommend their team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fatima Dia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp1AdkDCFTUNVR6VxgojNA029xCGEuAnSHcQLmckhtEeIV_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team was able to adapt music from our culture and mix it up with some Spanish and give us the night of our dreams! It was amazing 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Alexandra Gullo Porco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy8XPZrqqFlREWRA3f_fC8zY-8jX2L87jWMbLY7RzaZC5mYRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente servicio de sonido y música
El grupo Team Martin hizo un trabajo impecable en nuestra boda. La música, el sonido y la ambientación fueron perfectos durante todo el evento. Queremos hacer una mención especial a Fabián, nuestro DJ, quien siempre estuvo atento a nuestras indicaciones y peticiones, logrando que la pista estuviera llena y que todos disfrutaran al máximo. ¡Los recomendamos totalmente!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rocío de Andrés","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-47gutztn_Wv9K5uz6BTS6Z_OrpMcgxGA32RBWspvL1aoOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tuvimos a Fabián, de Team Martin, como DJ en nuestra boda y quedamos encantados. Tuvo muy en cuenta nuestras preferencias y fue muy majo. Para nosotros era muy importante que la música fuera de nuestro gusto y que no sonaran las típicas canciones de boda, y así fue. Un acierto!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ALEJANDRO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjoVwopbvlkzNHyeKpfbCB9gGE3yXeQik54OT9PoZpb3nxUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Contratamos a Team Martin Audiovisual para nuestra boda y no tenemos palabras suficientes para agradecer el trabajo tan impecable que realizaron. Desde el primer momento se notó su profesionalismo, su pasión por lo que hacen y, sobre todo, su dedicación a que todo saliera perfecto.

La coordinación fue excelente. Estuvieron en contacto con nosotros en todo momento, atentos a cada detalle, a cada cambio de horario, a cada petición. Nos sentimos completamente acompañados, como si fueran parte de la boda y no solo proveedores.

La música fue una auténtica maravilla: supieron leer perfectamente el ambiente, los momentos y las emociones. En la ceremonia, las canciones sonaron con una delicadeza y precisión que hicieron que todos se emocionaran; y durante la fiesta, ¡ni un solo invitado quedó a disgusto con la música!

El control de los tiempos fue impecable. Todo fluyó sin prisas ni pausas incómodas. La entrada, el banquete, el baile… cada momento estuvo perfectamente sincronizado, gracias a la organización y experiencia del equipo.

El trabajo con las luces fue simplemente mágico. Crearon una atmósfera preciosa, elegante y cálida. Cada rincón del espacio brillaba con un toque cinematográfico que hizo que tanto las fotos como los videos quedaran de ensueño.

Y si algo tenemos que destacar por encima de todo, es el cuidado y la atención con la que trabajaron. Siempre pendientes, siempre amables, siempre con una sonrisa. Se nota que disfrutan lo que hacen y que ponen el corazón en cada evento.

Gracias, de verdad, por formar parte de uno de los días más importantes de nuestras vidas y hacerlo todavía más especial. Recomendamos a Team Martin Audiovisual al 100%. Si están buscando un equipo profesional, comprometido y con una sensibilidad artística increíble, no lo duden ni un segundo: ellos son los indicados.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVIlz40PZn6-1gtUHTFLMLXcgA7mntT08EwHs-6raBEpnONw8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Contratamos sus servicios para nuestra boda en Villa Laureana y solo puedo darles las gracias por su profesionalidad. Atendieron a nuestras peticiones previas y durante el día del evento estuvieron pendientes de que todo fuera perfecto. Incluso nos añadieron un altavoz más que no estaba previsto para mejorar la calidad del sonido. Tuvieron un pequeño percance con el equipo y lo solventaron rápidamente.
Gracias por poner la banda sonora perfecta al día de nuestra boda! :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Hernández Pascual","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsV1GbyoJB_eyao7XhUDCCuI9HWPCTk2K-U5u0phKYqtpxCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este sábado todo el equipo ayudó a que pasáramos una de las noches mas.especiales y bonitas de nuestra vida.
Siempre atentos ante cualquier petición,  y con la mejor de las disposiciones y consejos.
Se nota que tienen una gran experiencia en eventos, estamos muy contentos con  su trabajo.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Paola Ontaneda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhzbaOrmO-w5MtWOC-2E0POI0XBIuP5Lxnf2LsX8qLbq6Ak7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best place in Madrid we just love it, the people are very nice and they have the best service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra García Amor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlgHwtm6BPzEf1a-eW9v-M1jQ3VUoiQi2GwzlmlJGHMYqsLK8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Musica bien, el local es lo que es..pequeño. Buen ambiente pero estar a 50 grados bailando..como que no. Ni aire acondicionado, ni unos ventiladores, aunque sea por vuestros trabajadores que estaban chorreando de sudor. Eso no puede ser, por eso pongo 2 estrellas. Cuidar esas cosas!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalia gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2EtrO638gpTzdslxS_b-LUK4pB7s3piRN7puW5y2ySGCU9JNj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He asistido al Tardeo Perreo Coffee Party y la experiencia ha sido muy decepcionante debido al servicio.

Lo más grave fue que mi amiga pidió un vaso de agua y le respondieron de muy malas maneras, diciéndole que no podían dárselo. Me parece totalmente inadmisible; hasta donde yo sé, negar un vaso de agua es ilegal.

Por otro lado, compré la entrada de 1 entrada + 1 consumición. No bebo copas, solo cerveza, así que pregunté si con ese ticket podían darme dos cervezas. Me dijeron que sí, rompieron mi ticket y finalmente solo me dieron una. Al preguntar educadamente, un trabajador (rapado por los lados, de unos 30–40 años) me contestó de forma muy desagradable diciendo que yo sabría lo que había pedido. Le expliqué que una cerveza no cuesta 12 €, y que por eso estaba preguntando, pero para evitar conflictos decidí dejarlo pasar.

En muchos otros locales este tipo de cambio nunca ha sido un problema. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jacqueline Bressan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWp1saDTmXzUcZCFg7wX6CnJdCxOHy6pr_U_0aqxUNcZH5tIL1-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No one speaks English there. They’re not mean only about skin color as you can see and other comments, they also treat white internationals poorly.
The girl at the bar with braids on last Saturday was extremely rude.
She doesn’t know basic English and thought my friend called her a b word

She then asked security to remove her from the club simply because she didn’t understand English.

I understand that Spain is not as strong economically as other European countries, and it’s fine not to speak English… but lying and treating people badly?

Don’t go to this club if you’re an international, no matter your skin color. We were American, Italian, and Brazilian — all white - and the treatment was the same. They simply dislike internacional people.

Shameful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emine Mutlu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhHilW_qMLGhmCU8vq0xB7409Ektmlke29xBCEFyft2YfGlG92=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This club racially profiled my friends brother at our graduation party. Before he was even at the front of the line, the bouncers told our group his hairstyle and outfit didn’t fit the “profile” of the club. They said this directly to me and my boyfriend at the front of the line, pointing down the line at my friends brother. When a mixed race woman who worked at the club came out to see what was happening (because I obviously demanded to see the clubs dress code which they didn’t have, and I started pointing out other people in line who were in shirts and jeans) the bouncers quickly stopped repeating his hairstyle as being as issue, but they doubled down that his “profile” wasn’t right for the club because they were “classic” style. He was the only black man in our group, and his sister and our class were there to celebrate our graduation. Once some of us got into the club, it was filled with white boys in wrinkled t-shirts and jeans. Some wearing hoodies, it was obvious the bouncers targeted my friend’s brother. On top of that, one of my friends that same night went up to the bar to ask for a glass of water and the female bartender threw an empty glass at her and told her to fill it in the bathroom. In the bathroom. Don’t support this club, the music is shit, the djs don’t know how to mix, the service is awful, and the employees are either racists or cowards or both. Spend your money elsewhere this place is trash.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Westberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3lkul7R9m5PfcRITeXlV94McZf5G8iUQcbua8YiXY_KchwFf5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went here for the first time; one of my close friends (black American) had her brother visiting. Out of hundreds of people they let in, they called him out and said he didn’t fit the “profile” of the club because of his (btw, incredibly stylish) street wear outfit, despite every other white man wearing hoodies and jeans. Don’t spend your money at this club.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryce Reece","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURad7R_aQJq8-36vIrCCASvkVrWj-GGWfYHGgDhmfVVNKa78Vmkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"club is clearly racist. they have no dress code listed on website but let white boys in wearing whatever but will turn around black men wearing the exact same, even better clothing. much better off going somewhere else","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A Nastazja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgRQnAjZse0YKDzCIM5szSa0sug6pPxsSRfDjjUd6TznTE56U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Racist workers and place. The worst club I have ever been. This place thinks it’s illegal to be a decent human being. Also disgusting and dirty inside. The owner should be ashamed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma Storck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgGiUBnRo7lyZm_bCmDfR8gc9StPP8rLvzzgyrDMN5-4lL70h2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was the worst club experience of my life. The bouncers tried to snap my friends real ID, and required us to show passport, state ID, and credit cards to enter. When our male friends attempted to come in they were turned away for having sport shoes on while every other man inside was wearing sneakers. Once inside drinks are 16€ each. For this expensive of a drink and with the unacceptable treatment we left immediately and will not be returning. I hope none of you go unless you are looking to have a bad time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenna Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkPtrrsrKPNx0FwX1tNclUem0FRGGw-aKZqDzmU69ziiOfxzGEwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Staff is low-key so rude but I mean the music and the drinks were good I guess","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tilli Weissenberger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXntf8N8dfd9AFvREG0HBdVDQHY_JiXBtDCH5KZC2h4zUI2eRhuuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A nice and clean dance club. I celebrated my birthday here on Friday 10th of January 2025. The Dj was great, the food, the atmosphere.. 10 out of 10. I couldn't have wished for a better birthday. We were 10 girls and we were treated with respect at all times. To be honest they treated us like princesses. Everyone was great and the waitress Agustin and Gustavo gave their all to make sure I had a great birthday. I even received a big backet of flowers for my birthday from the lady club owner. I couldn't stop dancing from beginning to the end, we were all possessed by the music and atmosphere. Thank you Kube for making my birthday unforgettable. Me and my girls we had a great night. I strongly recommended this place! 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yavor Atanasov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK71fGt2rjQvd4kuv1JfZgOO60bYSlbrjtVXBYWeMb4OH09nQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It's a chic place, good quality overall. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ben Rad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz9yaWGQwyt2cma0-UadpLaZU7JEikiuTfe08s17YwGlpMoJJ0Jg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is AWESOME! The main area is open and inviting, with a stylish bar to accompany it. In the back, there's a smaller room that they filled with smoke, making the strobe lights and EDM feel like something out of a dream. Finally, the graffiti all over the place brought a unique urban feel to the whole place. Not sure how I feel about the panda spraying people with a watergun, but I won't deny that it was pretty hilarious. Definitely not my last visit to this club!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk8Y3P5AE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2019-6-19"},{"Name":"Oliver Barnes-Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVriX6nqCT074-fjGa1UhYcLZ9B_T04mRqin32ek-KyAVuk28w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you want to experience what it was like to go to a dodgy small town club in the 90s, go here. This is just the type of place you used to find in a town of 20k people, far away from a city.

However they seriously wish this place was something special.

There's literally more "VIP" areas than there is dance floor. Which as a result means most of the club is empty, because nobody is in them, while the tiny dance floor (the size of your livingroom) is overcrowded.

This warm 200ml Pepsi (with nothing mixed with it) is €8!

There are so many better places that don't wish they were more. So go elsewhere.

On a positive note, if you're driving, there's a car park right outside the door. Handy when it's raining.

On a more negative note, most of the staff seem to be bored out of their minds. Presumably because nobody is buying drinks.

On a positive note, there's literally never a wait at the bar... Because nobody is buying drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBq8bx9gE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2023-1-29"},{"Name":"Christian Boustani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLntBYx98R3HchmX-6vGqWM5jLYKx1wrLeapquM6cqsodlu9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the worst club I’ve ever been to. THE worst. And i’ve been to a lot. The guards were absolutely AWFUL to us. We got free QR codes on the website and they wouldn’t let us in
with them so we had to pay 20€ + a drink that was basically non alcoholic. They put us into a room with 15 people when there was a big room downstairs that was packed. In conclusion AWFUL service the guards literally kept pushing us and the ambiance was TERRIBLE. Sincerely do not recommend this club to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Audrey Jane Boustani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFyaIYAvMCUzIEZPM3NKgd3JBGY5FMonHxQs0rju3Yg7vKCX0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give 0 stars I would. We paid 20€ for the entrance and since the big room was apparently “full” (which it clearly wasn’t) they put us in a room with 10 people when we paid the same price as the ones in the big room. My friends lost their bracelets and they kicked us out and were so RUDE!!! I spent 20 minutes in that club and paid 20 euros for an awful time and awful service. NEVER AGAIN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dubravko Novak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-9OhBfjPRnguf7BwZE9tuKshcPLRTBdnG_ktJ8r6xpAOfLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Vibrant club. Pleasant staff and security. Only reason why I'm giving 4stars instead of 5, is locker room. They don't accept card payment and queue to get your jacket gets pretty long.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had reservation for my friend's party had shirt had everything necessary in the requirements given to us for the reservation and they didn't let three out of 19 of us go in. Tonight almost a month later same thing has happened six of us go and two of us can't get in because of our haircut styles including myself and another friend of mine. He had a army cut and I had long hair. Absolute garbage of a place. Unfortunately most clubs in Madrid are very discriminative.

Love the fact that these guys put sorry for your experience and yet have not refunded my money nor that of my friends for the 3 reservations we never were able to eneter at there club. If your a guy who has a beard, long hair, or peircings showing anywhere you won't get in to this club even if the promoters tell you it's ok, it's not their prerogative it's only those at the door who are the bouncers who only get told by the owner who has a very specific list of yes and nos they have to memorize. One of them started training at my gym and apologize for the amount of times he denied me and explained why he had too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalia Bacariza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR9Lc8sz5NabPgO_2R1YQ65FAcMaTXVj5EDNXb4p1EWzVuCNbb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Music is absolutely horrible will never go back because of that. The security outside the club try and make it appear as if only super important people can get in when in reality the club is huge with horrible music and feels empty with the few people they let in. My group and I were lucky we got in but they were turning down so many people and separating friend groups.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanaka Mawindi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0X0eeSDdXqGjQ-Q6CJ86pT2VON4HSwdjbM_1lII146-oK3waj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely disgusted by the bouncers at this club. They allowed only part of our party to enter and refused entry to the others for "smoking" outside in the line or being around people who smoked. How convenient that most of the members who were refused entry were Brown or Black people...Never in my life have I encountered such overt discrimination for club entry. Disgusting.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamaica Aali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2olQenDcp7iHvIvIQmc5K6hRjZYJHBkwfsXV_jbHph6Z-jP4CXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely a vibe. My girls and I stopped in because a promoter outside mentioned that they played Afrobeats. Sold!  It ended up being a mix of sounds, but they played a few of our faves and we had a great time.

The reviews confused me about what the vibe would be, so here’s some detail. It’s a small but not minuscule club with hookah in the front and the dance floor focused in the back. On a Tuesday we paid a 12 euro cover that included a sugary welcome shot and a drink of our choice from the bar.

The place looks cool—think neon lights styled to say “Black Lived Matter”, a New York theme, and lots of posters of hip hop legends. It was a diverse crowd, but we were among the only Black women.

Certainly not a place with universal appeal, but it appealed to us!  The DJ was raucous, the people friendly, and at midnight things were really just getting started. Before we left we all said, “we’re definitely coming back here”.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mert Yüksel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMNCjW0yj4qdBbhf6x0ytUCdkYIGQAh1ywjgFfzjmYxh2LU6Pa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"That was definitely insanely bad for me. But the interesting thing is that is exactly what they offer. There are strippers inside and lots of people ordering hookah. Drinks are also insanely expensive(5€ for small beer). However, the staff was sooo nice, the music was cool and design of the place was very impressive. I think the place is on wrong hands. It really has great potential but bro……… don’t serve hookah in the club and get rid of the strippers….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-76DX4QE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2022-11-17"},{"Name":"Anna May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3ZM5MvF757Tp1mC19k7maCmFhPiSIxk_8Q6sEqcg820NiHpqY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped here on the pub crawl. We had a great time here. Super cool cocktails the way they are presented and tasted delicious. Highly recommend. The staff were lovely as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5PitpgE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Bojana Chapkunovska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCiWXQ7iQElawD0Prny3_L9glkrCYk8fyVf0sK-ctGBuzuv_o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst club I have ever been to. The smell was unbearable, the staff were incredibly rude, and the entire place felt filthy and unpleasant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeIa32b9UdGQyvgDqCtJXWSKEeIZ1IVQePVAgMDmU6R_SsyvjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Drinks: ⭐️⭐️⭐️
Service: ⭐️
Price:⭐️

It is a place that attracts very weird people. It has go-gos inside (not necessary) and the prices are not transparent. The attention is horrible and they asked us to change places in a forced way. The experience was generally unpleasant. just say that the shisha was not bad.

not recommendable at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpr7r8gQE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2023-8-12"},{"Name":"Volodia Kotylo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuSJBItdVemy9Vqp699KXn10HXVFb8AiFINxM2xe97sPHCjSCF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The club is veerry small. The screen is looping a 3 minutes long clip with advertising of ecstasy and sexy girls. Water is in the glass bottle, there is a small corner where you can leave it while dancing (and hope no one else drinks it))). That were so-so things. Good is your nice vibe, good company, local girls that know all words for Spanish songs. If you want to have fun, you will.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEl7DFxwE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2019-4-16"},{"Name":"Ross Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsXs7EYBfTkHk2IU6BT1dpYixBJB047gPOoIxPtuJKTdIdDiskVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our first discoteca experience in Madrid. It's smaller than we expected, maybe only 20ft wide, but long, with 3 bars. Cover was 12€ per person but that gave you 2 drink tickets, which was actually cheaper than buying the drinks outright. It's one of the few clubs that opens early. We got there around 10pm and were afraid we would be the only people there. We weren't but it wasn't crowded yet at that time. By 11:30 pm the place was pretty packed. If you're not into the really late club scene but still want to experience a discoteca this is a fun place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDczaO14wE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2018-6-1"},{"Name":"Bash M.T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5VVzJbaw08qglqJOHSqjFAdkxsd6ObgUZcxLjmUYdhOWL6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst place in Madrid, full of smokers and bad people inside, feels like a cloud of smoke. Avoid it by any chance","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Destanye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2jQNk3dHAyAKs0U4JTUTOqQnZM6GtGnzJgDBV2HjzcfdvGdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Wagon is located INSIDE the lab club. It’s actually just the Lab Club. Not sure why it’s it’s own thing. Took us forever to figure this out lol. But it’s super nice in there! A little pricey but huge and well decorated. They have coat/bag check as well but they make you check your bag, you have no choice and you can’t access it until you leave.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDS5iCX0w6qlGSXT7K7O0yQ&fid=0x0:0x4b8529ee4a64738"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Portugirl Xo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNDFo1g9v-u07ccP4iub9OiwxXRbjGP4WJoOWewnUMgO9Nw6fF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Really difficult to find… had to go through a train station, car park, escalator… there are zero signs, & it’s inside a place called “lab club”. They didn’t check my bag or anyone else’s which feels very unsafe for a high profile concert. The cherry on top was 15 minutes after paying €60 for a cheap, warm bottle of cava from the bar, security manhandled my boyfriend and accused us of smuggling it in.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miriam Martínez Arríbas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgenpGqd68KyULM9ZvV1BMiwkuIPc9eK2cYWZCyV3bON0EJG2bYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Classic","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iker Dobarro del Moral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnGBrkpZXdBkABSB9uloXX5uDPQui5BNN0dUNdqh2fXo5V_EQC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fui a ver un concierto de metal (Jinjer+Unprocessed+Textures), así que la valoro en función de lo adecuado del lugar para este tipo de conciertos. La acústica es más que aceptable y su disposición y tamaño hace que no sea difícil disfrutar del espectáculo desde cualquier lugar. Sin embargo, su diseño como discoteca hace que la mayor parte de su área esté ocupada por los dichosos reservados, dejando una pista mínima y haciendo bastante incómoda la experiencia. El personal, acostumbrado supongo a otro tipo de público habitual, es bastante seco y en ocasiones desagradable pero en general correcto. Los precios son los habituales en este tipo de espacios: 6€ por un doble de cerveza y 3 € por prenda en el ropero. No es la mejor sala para este tipo de conciertos pero es aceptable","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rukito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuwS8P2u-PQVgd5JioBzk4Pp0GYq-yhUry3y9iTNI6g-wjL5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor sala de conciertos de Madrid, mejor que la Riviera
En unos años le va a superar,eso de poder ir a mear y ver el escenario por un cristal es insuperable
Tremendo concierto que dió enter shikari,me gasté 550$ en merchandising porque gane unas apuestas y me lo gasté todo
Estos tíos son los mejores y merecen todos los premios del mundo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBABhyH5Pt6NfL7vNIricCB&fid=0x0:0x4b8529ee4a64738"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Miguel Ortiz García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKANKhsjW0-OlC1Rcat9mQ81oPGNBDYn5ai70iGnXkMmJBGaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estuve en el concierto de Coheed and Cambria. La experiencia fue positiva. Solo sugiero que cambien el nombre a LAB, no vi ninguna placa que identifique la discoteca como Wagon, le pregunté a varias personas de seguridad del Renfe sobre la localización y no supieran identificar el recinto como Wagon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYRAnTXtoUO3mgvavMEFBv&fid=0x0:0x4b8529ee4a64738"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Martin Garrido Susaño","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU04mfrZvNFwjuDhbqGAYGtQlxUiNbLR22Vq9qnf6dfnrFaG_Tbhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Sala grande, pero para conciertos un poco incómoda, siguen manteniendo sofás y mesas de discoteca, además de barandillas a diferentes alturas.

Muy recomendable sus fiestas que hacen y a los DJs que contratan y las colaboraciones que hacen. Sala principal muy grande y bastante bien equipada con luminosos. El sitio incluye ropero de pago extra y tambien hay reservados.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtTEKzeA_CffrLSzbPezpm&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Alejandro Bermúdez Calderón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMKoH07jGgG1KkSmTjr_opYJqGZleT9YzMTllYiVLJaehVdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui hace una semana con los compañeros de empresa.
Hubo un pequeño malentendido con el reservado, pero por lo demás todo genial.

Los porteros atentos a lo que ocurre y, quizás sea casualidad, no vi nada criticable en su trabajo. Al contrario, estaban presentes y la noche fue tranquila.

La señora de la limpieza es una crack. Estaba en todos lados asegurando que todo se mantenga lo mejor posible.

La pista central tenía una infinidad de vasos tirados, pero eso no es culpa del local sino de la gente.

Tanto los camareros como las camareras fueron muy amables y profesionales.

El ambiente es bueno, y sí, hay gente joven pero creo que cualquiera puede ir allí y encontrar su espacio.

Me comentaron que habían más salas o plantas, pero lamentablemente no estaba abierto todo ese día.

Los precios son lo normal en estos sitios.

Por último, decir que la chica que nos llevó desde la puerta hasta el reservado, Patricia, fue muy simpática, además de ser super atractiva.
Quizás el único punto negativo es que cuando alguien así te acompaña hasta la mesa, después es imposible fijarse en nadie más 😂.

En resumen, sitio agradable al que volveré para visitarlo al completo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Gonzalez Cuenca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIw91VDrraT9lAeUfwk5oLFh5l4nzkrVZYJ-Cg4YASEmOa4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Mi experiencia personal no fue buena. Durante la noche percibí un ambiente bastante tenso, con gente buscando conflicto más que divertirse, lo que me hizo estar más pendiente de evitar problemas que de disfrutar.
En algunas zonas la actitud de la gente no me pareció adecuada para un local de ocio nocturno. Además, la mezcla de edades tan dispares me resultó incómoda y poco apropiada.
El personal de seguridad es serio y firme; cumplen su función, aunque el trato me pareció poco cercano. En general no es un sitio en el que me sintiera segura ni cómoda. No volvería.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUz3xHdRaN9ClAoloces7j&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"E.Alejandra Barrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL93XqHJZ0KSvAT82WqL_hFtqQWrODF_2AcIdimCQJOxBvq3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hoy se organizaba un evento para menores de edad!! Lo cual en las descripciones ponía que los 100 primeros en pagar la entrada era a 1€ solamente ponía hora de entrada a las 17:30h y que finalizaba a las 22:00h .
Asisten los niños al lugar  a las 17:30 y resulta que había gente haciendo fila , cuando llega el turno de los niños ya con la entrada pagada con el supuesto descuento de 1€ les dicen que tienen que pagar otra entrada que eran 15€ .
Me parece increíble la falta de ética , organización y sobre todo que jueguen con niños de esta manera .
Sobre todo son unos estafadores!! De euro en euro que pagaron varios niños se hicieron su diciembre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgshuAQVzSGgzRoExQUvD2&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Diana Mardach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9PdsFChtU6n0l04GytlFmNP6N-JhPlaEnaddZG_rtRE6R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen lugar para conciertos excelente acústica y sonido en una zona llena de bares y fácil acceso en metro y línea de buses","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6wo4atpAU3jn9GB57hW2Q&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-10-5"}]

For djs who can’t even transition music properly…
If you’re 25yo or above, run","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Ramirez Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMIJgpRrXkZ5CgnADymOKlv-CowyZvRVe28C_V55jGIp0usg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Al salir de la discoteca, un chico que no era de los porteros pero estaba controlando el paso de la fila (con una gorra). Nos vio salir a un amigo y a mí y se puso a decirle a los porteros que nosotros no entrábamos más, nosotros nos quedamos súper extrañados porque no entendíamos y empezó a decirnos que habíamos salido por la salida de emergencia de malas formas, sin ser así,  ya que salimos por la puerta de siempre y no sabíamos de que nos estaba hablando. Pero el sin saberlo seguro nos acusó como si vamos, hubiésemos cometido un delito por lo menos hasta repitiendo varias veces que no entrabamos más con súper malas formas.  Nos dio igual porque nos íbamos ya a casa pero vamos, deberían de tener un poquito más de cuidado con como se dirigen a la gente cuando éramos personas que solo habíamos salido un rato con amigos para pasarlo bien. Y antes de acusar a nadie y negarle la entrada, infórmate bien y menos poniéndose así de esas formas cuando igualmente alguien se puede equivocar sin ninguna maldad de salida, aunque repito que no fue nuestro caso porque éramos habituales. [{"Name":"Sayaka Kyoko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4gWfJihIXDRTOhPaBsf_aQnsKF1hjzYe2R7W6HT-MYzPERA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They promise themes and they didn't  deliver. I went to musical night, and although we got there late (3 am) they didn't play a single musical song that wasn't Mamma Mia or The Greatest Showman. We didn't  hear a single Wicked song, even though we went on the day of the Wicked: For Good release. They didn't accept any requests on musicals/Broadway songs. I GENUINELY FELT ASHAMED OF LIKING MUSICALS AT A CLUB NIGHT THAT WAS MEANT FOR MUSICAL LOVETS.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Frauen Arzt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJ1O4EAq6EVCDTaaz9OjOzFsiFFpmgAauS01ccgFwbLVybag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very poor security. I was spat at out of nowhere by a young girl outside, but the security didn't care. In the club, a visitor was beaten up so badly that the whole floor was covered in blood. The visitors are either under 18 or over 30, very strange. ID cards are not checked either. In the picture you can see the blood on the floor, nobody has wiped it up!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3-bXAjgE&fid=0x0:0x8e43db7d3f4c48b5"],"When":"2024-11-16"},{"Name":"Alex Mayr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYqxg5Urr6SJKHjshn475YP1KqnOykrA6pe3yZXAQu50pCcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I went on a Thursday, where there weren’t too many people. The audience was also generally quite young around 18-20.
But the music was good and we got two alcoholic free drinks with the ticket we bought. However, I think the drinks were maybe diluted with water, but I‘m not 100% sure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nathan Franquelin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFadXceOXkT1A26j_tFTGcZCKhU-l5oGZlvko4HjcBHoFwAWk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The club is quite nice but the staff is horrible especially the one at the entrance. They have a guest list until 00h30 that allows you to pay less, but even if you arrive on time, they make you wait in front of the club (even though the club is fully empty) until 00h30 is passed so that you can pay the full price. Very dishonest, happened to me quite a few time and to a lot of my friends coming there. And when you tell them about that they become quite aggressive.
Just know if you go here, don't expect to be paying 14€","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Adrián Pérez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8JkhhjxFYyq85c1xF5O1TT1C6xqeYRas5F36HfLvF3gL0HZET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place is really nice but it has lost a lot of popularity this past year, it tends to be less full and a bit less fun. The music is still very nice and the ambient as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andres Zubizarreta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8hI0l7igSLLNDi0Prh_Q31eqLMYcBjcTUaJG3Ax05hvG70SynAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is a spacious club with different levels for people to dance in. The music variety is very bad. The DJs are not real DJs, they just play the regular songs and they do not remix anything you may hear them replay the same song at least 10 times in one night. The air conditioning is terrible, it is very hot inside. The bottom floor was like entering a sauna and filled with bad odors. People would vomit and there was no staff seen to sanitize the vomit so it reeked of vomit the whole night. The bathrooms were disgusting and they did not even have soap for the people to be able to wash their hands. They also did not have any toilet paper. The cloakroom charges you 2€ per coat and 4€ for bags. The entrance is 20€ for 2 drinks at 1:30 am. The water costs 4€ . The floor was also filled with broken glass which is very dangerous if someone is to fall down, the glass remained on the floor all night without been cleaned up by any member of the staff","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arya Netflix","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGt_pMH0p1X-ItvJnBaaKJ6TLLET77uev8nsijSWIZ_ZWiEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It‘s the biggest children club I‘ve ever been. They charged us 25€ because apparently the club was full. The funniest part is - the club was EMPTY. I feel ripped off. There are so many good clubs in Madrid - don‘t waste your money here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dymytriye Juri Ratluke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEWHDgvt2btJ4mbzKD52wMvg-hZk3z28jfODlyuRU2y4Mau6tH-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had I been younger/drunker, it would have been a great night.
A place for teenagers - not angsty, smells funny, service ok, everything's ok.
Everyone is welcome, which is great, but just be aware that it's what you would expect from a teenage hangout. Do you really want to relive that??","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Elaine C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxktHU6SdVtSNN-_mTGlMghhLznrX7xjKE6gbCWNSEzGOFg20ZbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A marvellous hidden gem of a place in a residential neighborhood by the airport. The service was gracious and the food divine. The chorizo appetiser hit the spot, the ceviche in homemade tiger’s milk breathed comfort, the mussels were generously large with julienne vegetables coated in curry, and the panna cotta was out of this world—the savory taste of cheese blended seamlessly with creamy sweetness topped with burnt orange. The cool outdoor seating perfect for a warm summer’s night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5FsYPnJy-Y5AUjXXKBrF2&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Erin Gisby Fears","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS092l9DqyI04L-DMGBaekmw39WbHupopobYm4cQ4rnsUstA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved discovering this little secret garden on the outskirts of Madrid. We were staying in a hotel nearby for a one day layover, and found the restaurant there to be quite hopeless. So we were overjoyed to find this beautiful & cozy place. The food is excellent and the service lovely. We shared the mussels, wild carrots, tuna & tomato salad, and the lasagna, as well as a bottle of white wine. Everything was delicious, and the prices very reasonable. Check it out, you won't be disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMqdJqLIvp7ZfWBJBD-HqY&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Michelle Trunzo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvBsKyjXLH8HHCejfjm1V8PyohjHmhziQ2eD31e4nBjsXamQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here at Humo Gastro Bar is fenomenal, great atmosphere and beautiful people. This is a must. I guarantee you will not be disappointed. By the way this restaurant is family owned so you are really getting a home cooked meal. Once again, look them up and give them a try.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pedro Jaquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhfBHMwhrGnuPPecdGHdA7xU3pk2l9Uk4ggugkvZp6lSouzfDJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved this place! It’s small and cozy, with a great atmosphere and a really nice wine selection. The food was so good that we actually came back a second time during our trip — every dish was packed with flavor and beautifully done.

Marta took amazing care of us both times — super friendly, attentive, and made the experience even better. Chef Tere came out to chat and recommended a few plates that turned out to be incredible. You can really taste the passion in the food here.

Highly recommend Humos if you’re in Madrid and looking for a spot that feels local, welcoming, and seriously delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tymur Kurhanov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSLxiwePP3WrCoOMsDTHEb9D1yBnQ31cvqdSNMCwnFuIkqbdFjqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really enjoyed food experience in this restaurant. Pork was tender and flavorful, potatoes tasty and beer choices is also good. Prices are good, considering taste and food quality. Dessert was also astonishing. I got brownie. All in all, recommend to visit","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3Lou_lUZzCCCKhFPaoCT9&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Jennifer Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbYX5FnyyOXUP6DFoME6jSiUfwHN6YRKV1oS608YpEBKbzYWIF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed near the airport and walked to this lovely gem of a spot. The food was fantastic, the service friendly (we are English speaking) the atmosphere was stylish and comfortable. Good wine. We had a really enjoyable experience. Highly Recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMbn7cT89p2zgAE&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Alicia Steiner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9xY1HJxc-jTNgn322wzo_tbqbwIQxmlONq4UmXSzcZSMOg-yDHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was really good. Server was very attentive. Atmosphere was serene. We had the provolone, curry mussels, homos salad, and a type of Mediterranean ham dip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEP_TtMDCq7-5uAE&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2025-5-20"},{"Name":"Bob Richardson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcsNSsBENF3rk2Bkv5Dt-aJsTNeUl_fML1MSnvcP6W5v0_bg69yw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are in the area, this is the place to eat
Food was amazing, service was fast and my Spanish not being the best, they made ordering easy
We had the lasagna, which is a take on classic lasagna, but will leave you wanting more
Dessert was excellent, brownie with coffee cream
All in all, you won't be disappointed","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICblu_BjAE&fid=0x0:0x7f59b7a9b89dc588"],"When":"2024-7-26"}]

[{"Name":"Kent McCorkle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYpWSchbtjK3z-oW9i4dumMTFrqTe3oCPiwV4mBNGpzvX-usPd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First of all, this place is hard to find because it’s not on a street, so neither Google Maps nor Apple Maps will take you directly to it. It’s nestled between apartment buildings next to a pharmacy and another restaurant, all only reachable by walking. So once you get close, either ask a local or look for a path to the left of a little strip mall with a fruit store, barbershop, and charcuteria.

But it’s worth it! Generous portions at a good price. Definitely a local spot and not touristy at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBIo3LOasYw_KRM9aOkAr1&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Angela Bee Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIRgxbVeTtZ6YXy7TOiBG2U3OR_EbeTaCGDeviyhNJarofLk3pfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food near the airport! The gambones and salmon tartare were a highlight! Would highly recommend if you’re in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLhphl7hrpHDPqh1SToU7-&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Debbie G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdNmtCd8C3zUJEPwdJLtWGF0dw0rpSry0Tfos4SHw8aMnxkZ0b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great hidden gem in the District close to the airport.
Very small and well crafter menu.
The grilled jumbo prawns are fantastic.
Succulent and fresh","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPmfOP7U9brGJhEhwlKV1x&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"smita puranesh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs6i2uE_O0iNlPlUQCKcbXJLxjV_KpqHqJPnJzvjUr5rKKBvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very unassuming but one of the best meals I had in Spain . Outstanding freshness and flavour and the best service . Purple tomato, burrata and pesto , salmon and mango insalatta, pate toast, burger and great wine and service","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEAeMm91lE72R8xLh-nxTb&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Alex Dutra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDl8aid6IIQ7c2KF5t4ASuSizPvrJAbFR7xypjzvQPu8i777RGmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice, no-fuss place to stop by for lunch or dinner. The service is fantastic- they were very kind about my broken Spanish, and the options and prices are great. I’d recommend this to anyone looking for some food and a place to spend time or a quick bite before the airport.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ6wkUCxCWBZsdSmHBaBPA&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-7-26"},{"Name":"David Huchelega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1dw0YX40ohk3wvHzN0KNpVxruRVjQ2BaP1gb3HdMgm6IkBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing find near Madrid Airport—just a 5-minute drive! Visited in February while staying at an airport hotel, and it was a highlight of the trip. The calamari was perfectly cooked, the mixed salad was fresh and beautiful, and the mango tart was a delicious finish. Service was excellent—friendly and attentive. The Tinto de Verano was a refreshing highlight. Great food, cozy vibe, and a perfect stop for travelers or locals. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwjO7oqAE&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"DOREEN DONG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJItwgX-6wibVvf26W30JLnyy0lrTYETCrJ69y9UrxmxGlWKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is very fresh and service is really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5F--p4_HQLDvDGDbLwjkm&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Sal DR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6DllCQMnd4cDehM4cZ_0UE6v5HvMDbMh0uXjo6O4BKYpSiELNGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Unassuming bar with great drinks and traditional tapas. We really had great service and the food was very flavorful and plenty. A great experience in a very neighborhood area in Barajas, mostly frequented by locals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDNwuvbVw&fid=0x0:0xf0f737748bc5d1a1"],"When":"2024-1-21"}]

[{"Name":"Marie Faur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSWfBAYQ4ic4nHd_PyUdbUYwVK10x3RwVQdvgylYJQip6NBE3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice place to eat or have a drink in a cosy atmosphere. The waiter is very friendly.
We especially loved the « presa iberica »! The meat is of high quality.
We hope we’ll come back one day!
Thank you from France.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patrycja Patrycja04","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKptTYBGjzJwzTrYehV0geTQvD1zykv8ZRWjLxxoGlP9cTpyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious home made spanish food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWts74_QE&fid=0x0:0x2bce6d962a1cd9d1"],"When":"2022-2-26"},{"Name":"Charene Robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1V5JP7Ol_Sj3FdT4mg8VCZ5_BkzghvQe7kWTXRmKCNFFn36JD4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"As we were walking around touring a trip to Madrid, it started to rain and not just a sprinkle. It was pouring. We decided to dip inside a place and take refuge from the rain and also grab a bite to eat. We sat at the bar.

The wait staff was fairly rude, hardly even addressing we were there. Was this because this is more of a bar for locals and not tourists?

We watched another group of 4 sit at the bar, the waiter obviously knew them. They were served food, drinks and conversation. All very quickly.

We still sat. Wishing we were able to order more than the one little thing we had. We left feeling very disappointed and me, still hungry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christopher Cotton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUi9lOQEsqXfOjjpBmdYnKsDp7ymR5Idq7yc7WFlY15MGGk0pT6UA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It's a cute little bar in the middle of a housing estate. The beer is good, but the food is very expensive and not that great. Service was friendly, but when you give a bill, don't stand over them waiting for the money. Not very polite, we were given no time to check the bill. .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kerri Middleton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMV_7SdRqL7DlhIXv_VZ2gUBP2jyI1-IVeFM-IqMbG1Wg2sKLo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely little hidden gem! Good food, prices and service. 4 cokes, 3 plates €33. Recommended lunch spot!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Ybañez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1npDD4D49wBnH3FNe7BrnEd_0_-NDZcabKoews3F502SdTcRN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is great for eating and having dinner. Normally for dinner is a little bit crowded but as for the rest everything is amazing. The staff is so so nice and the food is great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pavel Helennar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9M99oTVxRBTyr8tP4miWFPmtdCizlBkTMvnentsl7JHQ-Jk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tasty and inexpensive: a check for two people (fried pork, french fries and cider) amounted to 22 €.  The staff is friendly.  There is wifi.  “Everything the traveler needs.”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriel Moreno Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJb7EMUFxG8C2tNU7l97VMWO3XPcjPO0990M3e2bFf3BfdeuzI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Nice personal and cold beer, however it is difficult to find and spot to park and visit the bar. [{"Name":"Daniel Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnstD-vQ-j-XfXP75qg6-43eKkj3YbEmY6d2PRPxAWDxZaZhqs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lovely outdoor atmosphere with local people enjoying drinks and food. Family run business with some interesting menu choices. We were in an airport hotel and walked around the corner to eat out. Is highly recommend if you are passing through!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJr2hoPj4Pr9dQ&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2025-5-25"},{"Name":"Will De Jager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhTh5di6s9TdnaNQ4ZqNUkJQiRnqIyvvYD3LlpTXXRjbd_-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for beer and food. Very friendly waitress. A tasty tapa with every beer. And the sepia a la plancha was good. And €23 for a meal and two prints is very decent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ciuca laurentiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEh-UXRUZu9kkXTvoakQxFXF418NjRwVFCehm433k_ABmx5ZI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A small argentinian bar/restaurant with few, but amazing dishes.The kitchen open at 19:30.We ordered tortilla,one burger,one pork steak,2beers(Quilmes)&one tea and we pay 27€.The staff was very kindfull.I'm sure we'll be back in this place.From the Madrid(Barajas)airport must to take the 101Bus only 3 station in direction Canillejas(Plaza del Mar is the station name).Only 10minutes lating to arrived here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkh_fNjQE&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2019-1-29"},{"Name":"Lilith Schneider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_7hiBTj9Ns6Tt1ALHhQB__Lj7mpw1fKscxzA3Q1VDJpUlDxpM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"pork skewers were excellent. staff very nice despite our poor spanish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOntnFwAE&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2022-6-10"},{"Name":"Roberto Lopesino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxO6RFiLIrMyYwDbcWEQTJ1vVWNwC2wlWiKCcLWuW0kuNtyPwnWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a pleasant surprise it was to find that Akela is back with great food and service. This has been a staple in the barrio since I was a kid and it still has great hamburgers and food in general. I highly recommend you stop by for a beer and some food and say hi to Jonathan. They have great service and you will be back.

Me hizo much ilusión ver que el Akela sigue teniendo muy  buena comida y mejores hamburguesas! Jonathan y su equipo preparando un gran servicio y volverás a por más. Lo recomiendo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fran Martos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpJAzdoI6-tag0ziiG-wsiz7igbJHcev7Nfl_UkUBQJKRqkMBO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Después de años sin pasar por allí, volvimos porque nos gusta mucho el sitio. Nos sigue gustando y cuando podamos volveremos. Pedimos chipirones y una tosta de salmón, ambos platos estaban muy buenos. Yo eché en falta limón para los chipirones, y la tosta que fuera más grande, jeje, muy ricos ambos platos.
Con la consumición mientras elegíamos en la carta (bastante extensa por cierto), nos dejaron una especie de pollo cajún o similar, muy rico.
El personal fue muy atento, teniendo en cuenta que estaba la terraza llena y sólo había una persona atendiendo las mesas, todo fue rápido y además muy amable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpkar_hQE&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2023-8-23"},{"Name":"Claudia Ferroni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX33svxLB6GWkIZ2ZyUzKyGvkuMC4CZdfdAoRXjK_4kH42aea6XVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Para un almuerzo de 2 pasos liviano. Esta en una plaza muy linda, cerrada y mucha gente. La comida está de bien a regular, platos no abundantes. La ensalada cesar era de invención propia. Relación precio calidad normal","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLlauhdw&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2024-6-21"},{"Name":"Lucía Zabala Liébana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ92rEm8wMGHqLMmVb2PHX2xsCQSbb3z_xE2qTXT9h801rv5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fuimos a cenar un viernes y fue el único bar de la plaza donde seguían teniendo la cocina abierta. Pedimos una huevos rotos con gulas que estaban bastante buenos (las patatas se notaban que eran caseras) y unos calamares a la romana que estaban bastante normalitos. Las camareras súper amables y simpáticas pero un poco despistadas. Dos consumiciones y los dos platos salieron por 25 €.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh-6DhmwE&fid=0x0:0xe48320661441b8f6"],"When":"2023-3-18"}]

Por otra parte los alimentos me parecieron una exquisitez es notable que se toman toda la delicadez del tiempo y amor para prepararlos

Sin duda volvería a este establecimiento y sin pensarlo lo recomendaría","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJr7GOFw&fid=0x0:0x7a9f8909e6347426"],"When":"2023-7-7"}]

[{"Name":"Sara Alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7Xc80s7TxBkWVl3g-Y_rWvfDp6Or_wJbxpMuH7Okkk-vHVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es un sitio con cosas súper ricas, lo lleva una repostera muy muy buena.. he probado el dulce de maracuya, la tarta de tres leches, el bizcocho de limón,  tiene unas palmeras súper ricas, le encargamos una tarta de cumpleaños y estaba exquisita, y en Navidad y noche vieja,  preparo unos perniles y paletillas espectaculares.... volveré","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLg0tuMRPPlYuPavDHmoM6&fid=0x0:0xc95a2b9111af6905"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Valeska Martinez Telleria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQSQiG7TrJ0jMUOI1K1dTAucax9p7aGS3yUFnpUEZO-dDrRG3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta pastelería es 100% recomendada, aparte de la creatividad para diseñar y entender la forma que uno desea la tarta,  tambien su sabor es garantía de calidad,  sumando la excelente atención de la chica que atiende,  os lo recomiendo 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzHfpyxMiZbwFSuoUf7GiL&fid=0x0:0xc95a2b9111af6905"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Oliver Zoquier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMoUXaxyRmKDUb3HA9kKwcBjTtIb_zV9AwlFU46VsgQklyoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor pierna asada al estilo dominicano la vende Dulce Horno, ¡sin discusión! Además, Raquel es excelente, siempre amable, profesional y con todo listo exactamente a la hora que lo pidas. Se nota el cariño y la calidad en cada detalle.
Sin duda repetiré y lo recomiendo al 100%.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFEx0tARSJAuSIoYTIhUiF&fid=0x0:0xc95a2b9111af6905"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Momentum Natura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGdw_Fnv4B9Gf-viDsqsmNHRpa8dkur26PkwrIzFxqJRoQMuRD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente lugar donde tomarte un buen desayuno, merienda o comprar muchísimas cosas tanto de dulce como de salado asi como mucha variedad de producto. Buen lugar sin duda","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leidys Paez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKP125AHtyueez-VHgRFrer8mNR0UzsR_v1LbWpFTH8si-6gg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es un lugar súper lindo y todo lo que venden es súper rico, lo mejor son las tartas de tres leches y sus tartas personalizadas para  cumpleaños ❤️ , la chica que atiende es súper amable y da una atención súper buena .

The pizzas  are delicious and one pizza serves two adults comfortably. They also do a lot of fresh pasta dishes that I didn't get to sample but they looked great

I cannot comment on the rest.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDuhOuHTg&fid=0x0:0xcc011b5851af3793"],"When":"2022-8-13"},{"Name":"Xavier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-21KtAkuEL0fFBaSm6FH4TauKXH4HA-OAgexB9wOCtovuWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I wouldn’t recommend this place.

Minus one star because there was a small piece of aluminum-like foil in the pasta (good thing I caught it before eating it).

Minus another star because the pizza was burnt and crusty and had little cheese (meanwhile, a lady next to us had a nice, fresh pizza).

Minus another star for the expensive prices and the lack of quality in the food. The pasta itself is good but store bought and the sauce was too salty for my liking. Also, they serve small portions for the pasta.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yavora Shotova-Stoyanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXs-Z_QfC15Dzq3BwHaq0_2Vvq_ukomx7jrp9EHtJsF6UCl-Yub=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect italian restaurant in Madrid. Friendly man running it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laurel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIOUprhYqdzJrr0PCFFowa7X5e03dNLY6PZNUIzBI09qNBZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give 0 out of 5 stars I would. Very disappointed in our order. We used Glovo delivery which was fine. But the food came covered in way too much sauce. There was no option when ordering to put sauces on the side, but that is common sense to do so. You don’t cover French fries and a durum falafel in sauce and then deliver the food 20 mins later. . I had the mixed salad and the chicken fillet and both were completely delicious. I was starving when I arrived, and though the serving sizes looked small on the plate I was totally full by the end. the staff were attentive and skilled and very welcoming. all in all I highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edward Marin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0hj1b0ePx5zbErPmHQqzzo-NUS12QUPAduSCfQSda2EloBYJ3JA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ok","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Viajero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjC17Ui-OdIEpG0Wm8-ghWkKimIthSzzndzfF7ongcI4M3gugB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Todo un descubrimiento la verdad... me han servido las mejores migas (sin exagerar) que he comido nunca y de segundo un filete de ternera sabrosisimo y con patatas caseras.
Los postres son caseros.

El servicio tanto del camarero (e imagino que el dueño) como de la cocinera es impecable y el sitio está reformado diria que recientemente.

Todo por un muy buen precio y que ademas admiten pago con Pluxee (Sodexo).

No me extraña que se llene de gente, incluso van los trabajadores del hospital de la paz que está como a 10 minutos andando, eso ya es buena señal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0ftJbJYnpblUsbznRdtAB&fid=0x0:0xea5e1cd51d761db8"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Jorge Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULrdfFeQyMHo5btreU8Kc9wwVpREXrO40GqeA6utFbz_B4OSXC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Primera vez, veníamos aconsejados y nos ha gustado mucho comer el menú del día, han sido muy amables y cordiales. Me quedo con ganas de repetir, da gusto con estos bares restaurantes de barrio, además había gente señal que funciona . Recomendado","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9wuf8rQE&fid=0x0:0xea5e1cd51d761db8"],"When":"2024-3-14"},{"Name":"Juan Alberto López Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NoeXnhwN8LlvaYMa1kUVxz6jpggrEUrOLdA0tmxywQgpOJDU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Precio justo donde Justo. No hace falta gastarse 30 ni 50€ para comer bien, este restaurante es la prueba. Y los dueños son muy simpáticos. Lo recomiendo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBgte44gE&fid=0x0:0xea5e1cd51d761db8"],"When":"2023-1-14"},{"Name":"Jose Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWZAbkuA65hfurtfW6pSFQfaPUu8w4hOqOQdg3ppauut-KHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Restaurante familiar, ambiente muy agradable y comida hecha como en casa. Personel speaks only chineese or spanish","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yonghe Guo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBUGGymIZTRJjmH9of_Z0mHbbypBdrnm37d-70WzA5bz9YTK5a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food and service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marivi Abellan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsj73DqypXQSy8mjihI-xyvdf54_QqLAgXM9C2t-2ntQaB3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Siu Chi Poon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgLEs0fOJnsWp24Oc4PMjtnZ_1OhgPyeQCrrf8bRo__pB4Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"這家中餐廳要不是google地圖上看到，在附近也難找到！因為是星期日很多附近都沒有店營業，就算是平日在這餐館街口前的一家食肆也沒有開，所以不易發覺這店在營業中，外國很多餐廳尤其是中餐館，外面看不見內裏有燈光，實在不敢進入！\n而具這點星期一是休息日，要不我們會再去一次！\n是晚市時間，客人不多，是星期日的緣故吧！因為午餐我吃太飽，所以點了一份春卷！一條長長的，比起兩三條小的更好吃！實在味道好！老公因午餐吃了肥膩的，只點了清清地一個三鮮炒飯！可惜飯不太軟，所以一小碟飯就吃了很久呢！午餐是吃了另一家中餐的咕嚕肉十分不好吃！所以晚餐只吃清一點的。這家價目實在相宜抵吃！只是飲品價跟餐牌寫的有些出入，但實在是抵吃的餐館，就不要計那少許！可惜的昃第二天星期一他們休息，所以無機會光顧第二次！十分推介這店！","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg7Ye6hAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x172d585246dc48ed"],"When":"2025-2-26"}]

[{"Name":"Mark Biek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImKeAOzX4b1doeAVtQ42zmpBvKNFK3HCyPMqhptK7-dxk0GGiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was delightful. There was one woman working by herself and she did an amazing job of serving everyone. It must have been annoying to have 3 tourists (us) come in and order tons of food but she was super friendly and kind the entire time. We had the bravas, nuggets de pollo, a cheese plate, croquetas, and the pollo/huevo/papas fritas combination plate and it was all delicious. Some of the most perfectly fried potatoes I've ever had in my life. We sat inside since it was cold and rainy but the outdoor seating would've been awesome on a nicer day. Would absolutely go back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alparslan Parlak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKU4waGCXBdHdOd0XLznm3nTHWSz-PBVjOYTVqksZZCFFJC8In=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Well, not recommend for eat, but you can drink your beer and watch football like all Spanish people do.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mango Broker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLq-axiZVxdUVHwcdpvGU18Y1jiyUxXGcXhGPtx6Q7uRthfFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good wine, very good service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Umar Tariq Butt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPp7TRywAxfemFgL7FqbgrN6MY3bmgIg86Pts_oX6gfgMieOvB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Serxio M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFe1zzx43R5EdGut42sR2BPWZAgDqNHxajsyx8mFAZBq2xbIc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Bar de barrio, con todas las implicaciones buenas y malas que eso puede tener.

He leído comentarios que se meten con la falta de higiene en la cocina y baños. Sinceramente, la mayoría de personas que van a este lugar no prestan atención a esos detalles...

La gente consume sus quintos, sus tercios y sus cubos sin prestar demasiada atención a los pequeños detalles.
Asimismo, piden raciones de bravas o bocadillos sin esperar grandes resultados. Es decir, viene a ser un bar de batalla en el que se sobrevive.

Tiene terraza a pie de carretera, pero a nadie parece importarle las vistas a la nada...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzp7bsFw&fid=0x0:0xb4387edec1c1b8e2"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"Javier Albert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUu3C7jOLQwVI8aDIMM_4641HQa5YOO2lWCQbzdINA4JH095ojSTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bar de barrio con terraza. Son bastante amables y el servicio no está mal. Buenos precios, comida rica sin pretensiones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX5KKHZw&fid=0x0:0xb4387edec1c1b8e2"],"When":"2024-10-13"},{"Name":"Mark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsjCDrq-Q7dewQlIkbFK5aFU4GgnyfHH4zAeaYql5kYG4jwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Los peores “calamares” que he probado en mi vida !! Mejor publico las fotos y opináis !!
Ya no se trata de limpieza , se trata de higiene y para ello publico las fotos de los baños .
Vergonzoso y de multa seria.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtqu2PFA&fid=0x0:0xb4387edec1c1b8e2"],"When":"2024-2-3"},{"Name":"Miriam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuRN_R2hr5vdrWu6ZBDUvvD-VZ-waeQtD4wM5izl0ui-gFkh8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pocos bares más sucios y llenos de 💩 he visto. Los baños daban asco, ni papel, ni jabón...pero desde hace tiempo, que la jabonera tenía costra reseca y microorganismos en plena proliferación. Miedo me dió tomarme el café, salí fuera a la terraza y a los 2 min me tuve que ir del tipo con el puro fumando al lado...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH9sbn7QE&fid=0x0:0xb4387edec1c1b8e2"],"When":"2024-9-4"}]

Sorpresa al llegar la cuenta, me cobran la ensalada a precio de la de mortadella sin haberla comido. Desde dentro de la cocina se oían gritos de que ese era el precio…. Nada recomendable","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicolás De Simone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWOs_qHIZnr0apdiqUuQG5984fySJ2RdFiEjrhtSt1C2PtcnbF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Buena experiencia en Restaurante A’Cantinella. La cerveza estaba muy buena y los precios son accesibles, especialmente teniendo en cuenta que se trata de una zona fuera del centro de Madrid.

La atención fue buena y el lugar es correcto, sin destacarse especialmente, pero agradable. Además, la ubicación resulta cómoda para quienes se alojan en la zona.
