Nice environment","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonia Canales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1pVLGd5Ob5wSEUT_1-baQR_w1AoUgljiasQ_iZvtQhREI9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sublime,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKs1JH1ASu-YWe2IQGNDf8CBrTSjnZ-jY5TbGmNIupv11BEzA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La verdad que la experiencia fue horrible. Fui a una comida y la carne cruda, los camareros se reían de nosotros y nos faltaban el respeto, los demás platos bien pero 40€ por persona me parece ofensivo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCaodJS0B-hlxngBRxStjF5&fid=0x0:0xd800159b5949afd4"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Madalina Bugiag","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrly-C0KyXyFoLJobvlc8sD8FRknOfgFjS3pPmYwU7rn9DhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visitar Finca Lucero fue una experiencia excelente de principio a fin. El ambiente es acogedor y elegante sin ser pretencioso: iluminación suave, música tranquila y una decoración que combina lo moderno con detalles naturales que hacen honor al nombre del lugar.

El servicio fue impecable; el personal atento y amable, siempre dispuesto a recomendar platos y vinos sin presionar. Nos recibieron con una sonrisa y durante toda la comida mantuvieron un equilibrio perfecto entre cercanía y discreción.

La comida, sin duda, fue el punto más destacado. Los sabores estaban perfectamente equilibrados y se notaba el uso de ingredientes frescos y de calidad.

La relación calidad-precio es muy buena considerando la experiencia completa. Ideal para celebrar una ocasión especial.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ignacio Hernandez Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhAAzEkeAfESCDQ1c4hMt2mlBJ45NNv7BH7J8ksTyUjpUMqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Si bien ofrecen una alta gama de comida, la atención ofrecida y la estandarización de los platos fue nula, ofreciendo el mismo plato de carne con una diferencia entre cantidades realmente visible. El restaurante no ofreció cambiar el plato por mucho que se notara la diferencia entre la cantidad, lo justificaban diciendo que era el corte. Sobre la atención, camareros con mala gana, olvidándose de cosas y cuando las reclamas te rechistan. La calidad de este restaurante para el precio que tiene es pésimo, si buscan un restaurante para comer y pasar el buen rato, este restaurante no es el indicado.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuUHQGw7nr1T4rmRv2QqNqaE3merThObY47vGRc2hKJQ3gBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ya he ido 2 veces y no descarto una tercera. La segunda vez recomendé ir a unos amigos y han salido encantados!. La primera vez pidieron pasta, lasagna de verduras, y distintas pizzas, en mi caso la de proscrito e fungui. Todo riquísimo! De postre pedimos el sorbete de mango (delicioso) el brownie y el tiramisú, muy rico todo. La segunda vez pidieron el risotto de setas (delicioso según me dijeron) la pizza barbacoa, de trufa y yo la de atún sin aceitunas y con extra de champiñones, para chuparse los dedos! El resto pidió para compartir la parrillada argentina, muy completa y rica. Aparte de la carne viene con empanadillas argentinas, ensalada y patatas fritas y genial de precio. De postre pedimos la tarta de queso, brownie y sorbete de mojito, genial todo! El servicio un 10. El restaurante super bonito y el precio estupendo. Volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP-ov5Ug&fid=0x0:0xd800159b5949afd4"],"When":"2024-12-1"},{"Name":"Elisabeth Belwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDXnz2TO6byNsDhcD-7UbVTDDEndUk3FQUj3CWg1uXGh4bKAc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"De mis lugares favoritos en Barajas. Casi siempre venimos aquí cuando voy a visitar a unos amigos de ahí. Es un lugar muy acogedor, muy bien decorado, buen ambiente, buena comida y muy buen servicio.
Para mi gusto, las carnes las preparan exquisitas, pero hay que reconocer que todo lo que he probado está bueno. Los langostinos rebozados son deliciosos y la salsa picantita que los acompañan les de un toque especial. La empanada (es la primera vez que la pedimos) está muy buena, con el tamaño apropiado para tomarla como entrante. El arroz con bogavante merece la pena probarlo, pero insisto, a mi lo que más me gusta de este lugar son las carnes.
Los postres están bien, pero es lo único que se podría mejorar…
Por supuesto volveremos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZxNjWew&fid=0x0:0xd800159b5949afd4"],"When":"2023-9-24"}]

[{"Name":"Kent Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUe3gqh2X3zB5NEzgCOCbprHH5g2r_GlHdwdgOiKR-xu1N9nM92=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They did a sonogram, blood pressure, blood test on my cats. Vets speak excellent English. Whatsapp +34 669 72 09 02","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICGq_Cy2AE&fid=0x0:0x76f70dc85f03b7fd"],"When":"2021-11-9"},{"Name":"Natalia Juez Hernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIR9xy1HkLRmff5tEjk_RLj081YJ-zbk0Tc_sbx3iPTi2Bte_qI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No tenemos palabras suficientes para agradecer lo que han hecho por nuestro gatito Baloo. Llevaba dos meses sufriendo obstrucciones urinarias y su calidad de vida había empeorado muchísimo. Desde el primer momento, en esta clínica hicieron un seguimiento médico exhaustivo, intentando resolver el problema de forma conservadora y médica antes de recurrir a la cirugía, algo que demuestra claramente su ética y su compromiso con el bienestar animal.
En una de las revisiones programadas detectaron un claro empeoramiento. Pensábamos que, como Baloo hacía pis, estaba vaciando la vejiga, pero no era así: parte de la orina se estaba acumulando y llegó a consulta con un inicio de peritonitis. La reacción del equipo fue inmediata y ejemplar. Se volcaron por completo con su caso y sin dejar de atender al resto de pacientes! Debido a los problemas que arrastraba, era físicamente imposible sondarlo, por lo que tuvieron que realizar una intervención más arriesgada pero decisiva para aliviar la presión de la vejiga y salvarle la vida.
Tras valorar el caso, determinaron que la solución médica ya no era viable y que era urgente realizar una uretrostomía. En tiempo récord, Noemí y María Jesús se coordinaron para asistir a Sergio, el cirujano con el que trabajan, y de un día para otro lo tenían todo preparado para intervenirle. Esa capacidad de organización, rapidez y trabajo en equipo fue impresionante!!
El resultado de la operación ha sido ESPECTACULAR: el mismo día de la intervención Baloo ya estaba haciendo pis él sólo y sin dolor, controlando perfectamente dónde y cuándo lo hacía, algo que no suele ser habitual tras una operación de este tipo. Esta cirugía ha supuesto un antes y un después en su calidad de vida (y la nuestra también) y este resultado tan bueno es una prueba clara de la experiencia, profesionalidad y del cuidado con el que hacen su trabajo.
Queremos agradecer de corazón el trato y el cuidado recibido por María Jesús, Noemí, Blanca, Natalia y Sergio. Se han portado de una forma increíble con Baloo y también con nosotros, explicándonos todo con claridad, paciencia y cercanía.
Dejamos un vídeo de Baloo haciendo pis solito y sin dolor el mismo día de la operación, algo que jamás olvidaremos. Varios días después de la intervención, continúa haciendo pis sin ningún problema y está completamente libre de dolor.
No nos cansaremos de recomendar esta clínica, de verdad. Además de ser grandísimas profesionales, son majísimas, humanas y cercanas. Ni todo el oro del mundo podría pagar lo que han hecho por Baloo. Se nota cuando alguien ama su profesión y hace las cosas bien por convencimiento. Gracias infinitas!! 🤍🐾","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjMjVSbSKmTOQKZ-nKV-lz&fid=0x0:0x76f70dc85f03b7fd"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"J LACORT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAx3EcTI66butvfgtN1Z88_WkS5xBr-75_s0B5nKwJg9mmiWGrxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un millón de gracias a Noemí, María Jesús, Ana y Blanca. Como profesionales son un 10 absoluto. Como personas, son inconmensurables por su sensibilidad y simpatía. Aman a los animales y lo demuestran en todo momento. Os estamos eternamente agradecidos de cómo habéis cuidado de nuestra Lupita.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Alberto de la Blanca Sierra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhzo3JqD1BIHzYLjj0UsdoKNIxkuDReuFgEmqgKfSZJBEt06Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Son encantadoras con las mascotas y con los dueños. Muy profesionales. Las mascotas están en muy buenas manos","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mi Ri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8dUggJ2Im9AF-XAxSpxQRHvqm0ClrWe-boGAm0PKX6Eg8DpL1FA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un equipo q logró con sólo ver a Sai lo q otros veterinarios no pudieron ver en dos meses. Atención personalizada, muchísimo cariño y eficacia 100%. Le estoy tan agradecida x la labor q hicieron con SAI q no sé cómo podré agradecérselo. Muchas gracias Sergio y a todas tus compañeras por tratar también a mis perros.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC83rC3ag&fid=0x0:0x76f70dc85f03b7fd"],"When":"2020-7-7"},{"Name":"Elena Bermudez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyjKFxo9jv4SWRsLt3_9puhW_CyDIoPqMqNhDFGOlpOApp9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo a mi gatita desde que la adopté y aún viviendo lejos sigo yendo a este veterinario. If you order the Daily menu you will going to eat a lot for the cheapest price ever. They offer 3 options plus a drink of your choice.
As I said, nothing extraordinary but have a great food, a clean place and friendly staffs. The carbonara was delicious!
I just got pretty satisfied with everything. If you are around the airport and it’s planning to save money, that’s a good place to go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-gNyfVg&fid=0x0:0xf135a403fc8b110a"],"When":"2022-11-18"},{"Name":"Nancy Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqtBuBFE7EP7GLa2YwclnpXeASRNbw_OVEoMj5kVmhslGRhtsr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to ditch our hotel's restaurant in favor of coming here based on Google reviews. I'm so glad we did. We had a lovely evening under the trees. Our waitress was charming and all the people around us seemed like locals. We started with the tomato salad topped with tuna. That was great. My husband had the pork ribs which were slathered in an absolutely delicious barbecue sauce. I had the shrimp which were big and meaty and wonderful. We definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR0vGE-wE&fid=0x0:0xf135a403fc8b110a"],"When":"2023-4-21"},{"Name":"JayP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDZlyZq3lUiVDoWW9ase9qIQBmyZang2aYtiUSNUHesOKlE74D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"At the time of this review I believe the 4.1 starts is a bit over rated. The staff speaks Chinese and English as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv59CMGA&fid=0x0:0xf135a403fc8b110a"],"When":"2024-12-15"},{"Name":"Ricardo Macpherson-Ortiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1vYHcoeVMtLAZuOyWj5FZ2ZEAy1I9lj4J8EjPTEF7Nl13Eql9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you're in the Barajas neighborhood and too jet lagged to head to downtown Madrid, fear not. [{"Name":"Elaina Genthe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQS9tY1DQg57uC2rYpa_Xmm9yk-AOw9K1Ei1smQcmFPBv1yg1c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was fine. Disappointed in the lack of vegetarian options. The atmosphere is nice. It feels upscale for a hotel restaurant. The service was abysmal. I don’t know if it was because we are foreign (one of us speaks perfect Spanish though) or because we had a toddler with us, but our older male server was not friendly at all and also forgot to bring us our drinks. It felt like our presence was annoying him. 🤷‍♀️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andy Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXISG7duSQ2dKe8IEGI1AG8IH-MTo7ZKdssdzKpdezGB7Z155EW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very good hotel restaurant. The food is very good, sat outside on the terrace with great atmosphere. The server Claudio is awesome. He was very fun and treated us like royalty. Highly recommended","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZ2oGcSw&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2023-9-8"},{"Name":"Aldemar P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsjzdpycSmLmtJo66o-TvAbSJy-HLZnRSuR09xMYQluGRVuw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and nice food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwoPr42AE&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Bárbara Medina Vera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw2JuyzwNyvvZTxKHC5NQ77HohFJIRqjXqpEaaC7CwkgavQGg91Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La comida es muy buena. Palabras de mi sobrino: todo muy lujoso ☺️.
Tranquilo y personal super atento.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIy6yeRHE7NMsa8kHRmgkr&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Alazne Rosco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjEl_2Jpfy5Cm_HpkUz7gIkuJituTtN2DCkkgkCR6HfPgdpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El arroz ciego o del señoret es incomible se les a ido la mano con el pimentón es a lo único que sabe, el marisco de muy mala calidad y sin sabor alguno. Se han cargado el plato con el pimenton. Muy desagradable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkxdBFExN2P9m_kqi_qN2v&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Pablo Sanchez Carmenado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8tuw5Q4jQtqKKZFnU_BVv3tdzTyovwN1_KfmxtAaPkzLn2qXK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo más de 15 años comiendo y celebrando eventos y es una delicia.

El personal es sobresaliente, siempre te ayudan, adaptan y dan más de lo esperado. Es increíble como saben estar y dedicarte siempre la mejor sonrisa y atención.

La comida destaca el menú diario siempre con opciones para todos, verduras, cremas, pasta o ensaladas en los primeros. ( los platos de cuchara de temporada son sublimes)

En los segundos todo rico y bueno pero la carne, albóndigas, bistec, solomillo muy top, en pescados mejor ver cuál tienen.

Los postres siempre hay fruta de temporada, natillas, imprescindible el arroz con leche y la tarta.

Es una grandísima elección en la Alameda, conviene reservar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKTFkuSptYW89QE&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Gabriel Carrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlEuuKBXE90-KjVf0Gs_jEI3KKdfl1TvJOkTksL4K5p4xzsXyz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lo usé como cafetería y no como restaurante. Un ambiente muy agradable con musica agradable, un excelente trato por parte de los camareros, los pinchos muy ricos, limpieza impecable, algunos enchufes donde conectar el portátil... No tengo nada más que cosas buenas que decir. Quizás como contrapartida el precio es mayor que en otros sitios.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDH8fn7-wE&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2024-9-17"},{"Name":"Rubén Tejedor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwDMEvsEOIjeSrPVa_E5VrOLFEutFVyt-yXmCQnZ6cReOGSy-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un buen restaurante de hotel con precios asequibles y producto de calidad. Excelente servicio y muy recomendable la terraza especialmente para cenar. Servicio muy atento. Ideal para ir después de una dura jornada de trabajo. Muy ricas las chuletillas de cordero lechal (de verdad) y las ensaladas César muy abundantes","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDH-KX7fw&fid=0x0:0xb52d91399250d709"],"When":"2024-9-12"}]

Los y las camareras son más majos que las pesetas.

El local es muy agradable y tienen una terraza grande y parcialmente cubierta para los meses de frío.

Súper recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristina Sanchez Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP8RE0Le_Au5rZ4e8dxsjBDYnCOUcqx7YJNSM7IJiyDeM2veQx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pensé que era un bar cafetería no una discoteca. Pierden unas clientas habituales porque no hay quien aguante.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8HDHf6j2j07DFoJtXUetE&fid=0x0:0xaca54730417300d6"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"R J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4T7IDyV26IAyiLnBuwegGO-_4-aLIVNqQHY-ZkYoTYO-QDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Das Essen war nicht gut und die Portion zu klein für den Preis. Nervig war, dass alle 5 Minuten jemand kam und uns Tapas verkaufen wollte obwohl wir beim ersten Mal schon nein gesagt haben. Schlechter Service und trauriges Ambiente. Nicht zu empfehlen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Roman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUgvZ7_0Lt8-atBeeFgTLKGmdvSgU6NZzVy_5GL6Tns8O6i4s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Bueno, nada más entrar por la puerta, pedimos mesa (éramos 4 personas por la noche) y lo primero que nos dicen es: "No hay cocina abierta", después de eso tenemos que esperar unos 20 minutos sin exagerar a que alguien nos tome la nota para poder beber algo al menos, al final nos fuimos sin tomar nada, simplemente decepcionante. No lo recomendaría la verdad.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"bella nena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKViwv5_eHASaj0KU_0Or2YT4zxfHBi_m1n2-W9ODGaF0A0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Anoche fui x primera  voz con una amiga  y no pienso volver, en menos de 1 hira q estuvimos ahí el camarero salió a fumar varias veces,  y me pareció asqueroso q con las manos sucia del tabaco servía los aperitivos,  no se si no había pinzas para cogerlo,  eran unas rodajas de pan con tortilla de patatas x encima y lo cogía con sus manos sucia, servía las bebidas igual,  sin lavarse ni una ves las menos, la higiene brilló x su ausencia,  volver lo dudo y recomendarlo dificil","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marisabel Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAcIgV57dUILZInLyv-v7B-rJHuwTqvyYQvPNMzLL7lNEFcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente lugar, primera vez que voy y realmente la atención fue excelente las tapas de croqueta de rabo de toro espectacular y el pincho de tortilla muy rico.  Ya iré probando el resto e iré comentando.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvPg_kdhWWW9MvHyVs96A2m1enEgz9RVlKyJ-copa9Vu5UlyApkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Lamentable experiencia. Después de intentar comer un cachopo nos lo pretendieron cobrar entero.  Se ha procedido a la denuncia a consumo correspondiente. Le devolví la mitad en un plato y nos dijo que nos lo comimos enteros. La ensaladilla es lo único que se salvó (soy una persona justa) Pronto se quedarán sin clientes, según estoy viendo las reseñas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danic Cont","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3LLzrMxulexBitGh0_defnA8fQhMTLi-PEsjYZcIq6nThdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Hicimos una crítica a la comida y acordamos un descuento con el jefe de mesas por la baja calidad de uno de los platos (el único que habla español) salió el cocinero a increparnos en chino. No saben de hostelería, ya aprenderán. Eso y el idioma del país.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Graeme Kernich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6fPEGLG0gcnr8xWJnjJ68fEFOf-C6JkrvdsG1Bb6lPHABfw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is an excellent restaurant. Great steak, reds and appetizers. After dinner apertifs and atmosphere was special and the service was second to none. Highly recommend checking it out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAbONV3QSw_5FWXq6I7IPC&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"pp james","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXo6Nf3lQD_7ztEh5lCMt1QczxG_v7wYskLx_LsRD7_Fo_Ayt8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best food, the best service. This is a place where you need a reservation, but as it was my first visit to Spain and first meal, I didn't know and came without one. It was fully booked, but thankfully, the owner managed to make a spot for us. The food was truly delicious, and thanks to the owner's attentive care throughout the meal, it was a delightful dining experience. Although it's my first time in Spain, the first impression became much better because of the owner. Thank you very much.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXoKyvxAE&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2024-10-22"},{"Name":"Erik Aldeborgh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY0OFQxCWt6nBIWJYUTH8cOUtlgNlHT-GZ_FmeTmWretZx6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here at the tail end of 2 months traveling through Europe. Most definitely the best steak we had on our journey, perfectly cooked. Artichoke with jamón was nicely presented and very flavorful. Suckling pig was very nice, but not the best choice for our palates. Sides were very good too. Slight language barrier left us with cheesecake that we were told was carrot cake, but it was delicious anyway. A most enjoyable meal! If you’re looking for an excellent steak, this is the place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjpqGGIA&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2024-4-20"},{"Name":"Bjarke Jensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLt6kBLAszjdFDSa6tbV4DRc_XtlOnZhI32NGZ33uEr0n57=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Arriving early, because my Scandinavian circadian rhythm is not build for Spanish schedule, and having dinner at 19:30 already seems a bit late, I was well received, even if the kitchen (or the dining room for that matter) wasn’t quite ready yet.
The server apologised (which was not needed at all) and suggested I had a beer while everything got ready. The tapas served with the beer took the top off the worst hunger.
I have nothing bad to say about this place at all. The food was great, the service was excellent, the atmosphere is nice and cosy. A great way to finish a couple of stressfull workdays 2500 km away from home.
Highly recommend for anyone who end up in Barajas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luma Bendini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7afOzL_GInYyX-EZaEfTg4Pq__JSPQVl_BMQ_Nk79jpmfT8Yxow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a 5 hour connection in Madrid and really wanted to go for some local food. This restaurant is 10 minutes away by taxi from the airport (12 euros trip) and it was an absolute great surprise. With an amazing service, this place is full of personality!  We had fish and meant wich was great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICW9u3p9gE&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2022-2-26"},{"Name":"jenny celani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiyhbRN9RtUX-_Cw4ys9WUNr_0u2jEz7VmQCRq6lmvSgBMoeM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very old school
Spanish food was ok but quite salty and heavy  I had the rabo toro ( oxtail)  very pleasant staff local to our hotel for a short stay  would return","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDojuGM8wE&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2025-4-24"},{"Name":"Edu Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDACll8Sugpm5DOri3ibRqAaB5ZjkKO1pLRTeORqrdM4Q0RalF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic place to enjoy traditional Spanish food cooked in a real delicious way. Special mention to their steak selection and fresh fish options. Price is affordable specially compared to those in Madrid city center. Will come back every time I need to fly from Barajas !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR-fzNEw&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2023-4-29"},{"Name":"Anna T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkOBpaSJs6FH9Ait6AJbeU5iGe_l4nXZwUjhmwKb8eJccUdXMo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed at a hotel near by since it was close to the airport and came upon this gem. We did not have reservations but they seated us. They were attentive and super helpful as we did not speak
Spanish. The food was exceptional and made a foodie couple happy. My husband and I will fly back to Madrid to just go back and try the grilled meat dish that we did not get to eat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDl3tfd6QE&fid=0x0:0xafeb0fda1d0cea95"],"When":"2023-12-2"}]

El tomate muy rico con un toque a ajo y el pan normalito.
No me gustó que en mi plato hubiera un pequeño trozo de jamón serrano y una miga de atún... me darían el plato de otra persona sin lavarlo????
Había muchísimo barullo de gente.
La próxima vez iré al bar que está al lado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIsYuegQE&fid=0x0:0x520eba72d82468fc"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Paulina Maldonado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeUKzY6NSKDq4RYJhsxEv6FZQE_dOvN8hhDqIkWTr98JoFSV8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este restaurante es excelente buena atención y la comida de primera y muy fresca y mucha variedad en el menú  realmente lo recomendó, está ubicado en la Avenida Sur del Aeropuerto de Barajas, Edificio 16, Centro de Negocios Eisenhower, Madrid-España
Whenever you are in Madrid I’m really recommend this restaurant because the food is very good, fresh and the customer service is excellent it's worth it, is located on South Avenue of the Barajas Airport, Building 16, Eisenhower Business Center, Madrid-Spain","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICtqfqnsQE&fid=0x0:0x520eba72d82468fc"],"When":"2024-1-30"},{"Name":"RandomRogii","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3NxccROAf1U-UVsnMeD1fpli9qudtul2HdoLfPfEQd87RdbJI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Desayunamos y comimos el menú del día aquí. [{"Name":"Karen Afable","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhip9Clsz4CM9hPVd5iLsm0cNlk7zkqlJuOi-SlzDL_07M3EQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed at Zleep Madrid Airport Hotel and wanted to check out this place with home cooked meal. 11 Euros gets you a drink, appetizers, mains and dessert. 12 Euros if you want it with Coffee.

Well worth the money and more!

The ladies, Terry and her sister are such Spanish darlings.  That would be rare to come by.  Most of the Spanish women in this whole trip are a bit snobbish but these two are great!

They have a picture book menu for those who don't speak Spanish.   The food warms the tummy and we left happy.

Would definitely recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJtBzoMnuZqsKZnuKznU5I&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Lex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzMuxeHQHrDzM8vaXi1tKQcHXsaqwL8uJHK8WJaJ0owCdMkrI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing homemade food. Had the Potaje Casero (garbanzo bean and clam stew) which was so good, I'd definitely order it again, also the Tortilla de Queso (egg and cheese omelette with fried potatoes on the side), and the Flan Casero (homemade flan). Ordered water, they gave me a 1,5 liter bottle which I could take with me, which was a plus. Definitely recommend for a local experience, and be prepared to speak in Spanish! (They also happened to have an old Kevin Costner movie playing at the time, dubbed in Spanish, it was entertaining lol)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDItJuGpAE&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2025-4-7"},{"Name":"Chandra Mohan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHohEtYVcbfzCvDBBhz9Fp0w9Eh5IugguVekafbh3mAmSKAdmFLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited this restaurant in Madrid back in 2020. Though it’s a small place and I was initially hesitant to step in, it turned out to be a wonderful experience. The picture menu makes it easy for non-Spanish speakers to order, their homemade wine is excellent, and the service is truly outstanding. Definitely worth a visit!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johnny Johnny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX43N5bBBx7Pw94ojZIUxGpf930xWCPQPKnzV6RMZZAPbRmOb1dUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is my first meal in Madrid, Spain right after I've check into my hotel room. Its about 15mins walking distance from my hotel.

Upon arrival, I was surrounded by friendly fellow patrons of the restaurants. I manage to speak to one of the friendly waitress who understands a little bit of english.

I ordered the set menu of the day, which include 3 course with a drink, for 10€.

I enjoyed the the food and beer there. I would recomend if you are nearby 👍🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjsJ-y3wE&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2024-4-28"},{"Name":"Dima Ivanov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJFz5eWHzQkV3-sQY0ysVoruT2hHOMnyl9TxhuiXniIs22NV3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent traditional spanish food. Artichoke and the veal dish were my favorite. Dessert was delicious as well","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI-fW7CQ&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Dinusha Chandratilleke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6YWP3qkuL8-T4-Pur3XqlI-cs4ei0rEDgOdnY6lSHQnAs93TA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazingly friendly staff who went out of their way to help us order dishes even though they spoke little English (and we didn't speak any Spanish!). The food is not fancy, but it's tasty (perhaps too much salt though). Food portions were generous. But be aware that the food is very oily and heavy, so don't order too much. Walking distance from the Marriott Auditorium Hotel.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMiN2BdQ&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2019-11-10"},{"Name":"Terri Breed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUC7LL2kH6NcTB4ZmalxYyEjOfIuYWtWfI8KfHzac9b61DY5U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A genuine experience less than 9 minutes walk from the Marriott.  The kind waitresses will treat you well. Best flan I've ever tasted!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEiKj6cQ&fid=0x0:0xfd6abd669472c788"],"When":"2017-3-15"},{"Name":"Roméo Dimier Degrange","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP543_lz4fUxLgSHxp7EWkvzihUaCYpLNsYWZTLZCKVpJZ__ncIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's a very good place for a cheap lunch, the formula (3 courses) is only 10€. The service is good, very "typical", and fast. However the food was a bit cold and oily. I'll need to try other dishes to compare.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Ambiente tranquilo para estar a gusto. Muy recomendable. No entiendo esas malas críticas tan injustas, seguro que ni siquiera estuvieron en este local. Hay que ser envidioso y tener mucha maldad para intentar perjudicar a gente buena que se esfuerza (y lo consigue) en hacer un buen trabajo. Yo he estado decenas de veces y nunca defraudan. Chicos, seguid así, ojalá muchos aprendieran de vuestra paciencia y saber hacer. Si os ladran, señal que cabalgáis","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELv48uW7i8jk0AE\u0026fid=0x0:0x2a26a8f18d757ac4"],"When":"2025-5-13"}]

We were a group of 8 and could hear each other perfectly and we really liked the set up. The waiters were great and brought us the typical snacks with our drinks while we waited for the kitchen to open. The food was ok, but nothing memorable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fred H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgOBiv1ReFBjbSP5-HIEXTF7e6cTMtc9OGT_huLAFx6ItRatTI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Giozas and bao were great, ceviche was OK, fish was disappointing, the plate seemed to miss some fries or salad or rice. The brownie was looking dry but my friend says it was delicious. The torrijas de pan brioche were delicious, the best torrijas I have ever eaten. The place is great due to its massive terrasse but 3 idiots started to smoke cigars and the smell was awful. Waitresses were OK.
They have a cocktails card but they did not do cocktails...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICq5KfwGw&fid=0x0:0xd81593f723280cff"],"When":"2021-5-27"},{"Name":"Edward Blunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYG5-owghqmRSjmBhiLk7btH_BkjoKKKRXSNmtPJQn4yA_v08-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food, the salad was especially good. The fillet of beef was good value but was so big I couldn’t finish it. Would heartily recommend this restaurant tuck away in a small shopping mall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDU6v_XsAE&fid=0x0:0xd81593f723280cff"],"When":"2019-8-20"},{"Name":"Sergio Sánchez Ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUc6LujOePXWzS0L1cwqgu_oXKD9WUvbzpBiylW7yQVgM9W8_nS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Although the overall experience is good, it is not amazing.
I have had lunch today and both of us chose the daily deal (“el menú”).
It was served pretty quick, and the presentation was good too, particularly if you consider it was not a la carte choices.
The first dish (scrambled eggs with mushrooms) was ok; a bit too salty and the eggs a bit dry. But not too bad.
Second dish, tartare salmon was pretty good. Not amazing but good and tasty.
For dessert I ordered seasonal fruit. However, only pineapple was available and this was canned pineapple, which was a bit disappointing.
The bread was a bit too soft and sweet (not too bad but, to me, not ok).
The atmosphere was good, pretty pleasant, and the waitresses who served us, very good (overall service was great).
Whether I would recommend it: I kinda think soo, but. 😉","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristian Kolstrup-Jansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpoE7keZXkYeggC7o7ji4ZOOXrqwgze859Ex_yKiG_nqAiDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The terrace is a very nice place to be in the evening. [{"Name":"Jesús García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9G2tEMqCkKINlQ4qKTtkRqtfoe3XpFOsFlGHkLTMTdzMID4Q5-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to grab a delicious burger and to start the night with a few drinks afterwards. There is the option to customise your burger with a different choice of breads and meats.
Service was very attentive and adequate.
This is one of my favourite places for a good quality burger in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICmg8jnNg&fid=0x0:0xd5433b187cf811c0"],"When":"2022-1-7"},{"Name":"Alejandro Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHk2nbyV1HYyUXx8bXnKtGbRG7n3r_5fqwa7ozq4iCVkJWQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want to treat yourself a delicious burger I recommend the cowboy burger. It was so delicious if I had room for one more I would have eaten another one. I washed it down with a chocolate brownie, I then went on a food coma.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nila Patty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCBMW_nJ05aSWenTbxO4l3HII6CXGozVWqBcliLhml1Hw-vLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First of all, we are vegetarian, so don't expect something extravagant.
we ordered vegetarian burger and pizza.
The burger together with the french fries was cold. Then they bring it back to the kitchen reheat it. Instead of replacing it (I think it got reheat in the microwave or so, because the fries that I just bite was still there...but tiny bit warmer).

The pizza was burned on the edges.
And then, when we want to finish up. They relocate us. They said it was so we can enjoy some drinks in the bar. When we arrived at the bar, there were no space available so we have stand in the corridor/the serving way.
Once we are seated, my friend order normal coffee (americano) and got espresso instead.

I think the location is cozy, but the service and the cooking needs some improvements.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grant Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHHgrTK9d7UA5bi_-cuiQ1Bh1kO64SBBV1s8266c5a0x07BA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Long story how we ended up here, but glad we did. Great food, wonderful service, reasonable prices.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan José García Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUI2Dh6wTx42gVEeec-XeDR64wGhaOfi_vTEMzhQkfN53lbs7G_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The food was good, although there was a tiny problem with the lunch: for deserts they had the option of icecream, and the one we order was served pretty much melted, it was no longer an icecream. We ask for a different one, and they replied that the flavor we wanted was all in the same condition.
It may seem a very small detail to judge a place, but it should be remembered that the desert is probably the most expensive part of the meal (relative to what you get), and nobody forces them to offer something thag they know is not right, and they should have known. Plus, it is not so difficult to keep icecream as icecream, instead of almost like a shake.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kriss Valle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGLO07rE7qjzYHulfo0Ryxf1gYDsDiwysfZ-rQxqg1pz80teo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best burger if not the best ones I've tasted in my life. The staff were also great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fares Al-Fares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyE2KN4lwPk4R008zJQcSAFPc2iJQmbFnXKvvpdudDtGFsEBiS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So great selection of burgers. The wagyu burger is top notch. They also have really good pizza too. Their set menus are great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ayrton Cordero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdBh6PhMeHW4mQ4i1_GQuX2zAM0xBpyMHSHCOm4hB5ZTyeNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have very good food at this place. What I got was something completely different and honestly concerning. Instead of thin, delicate prosciutto, the sandwich was stuffed with thick slabs of cheap jamón serrano — easily 40% of the whole thing. It was so salty and tough that it was nearly impossible to chew, and frankly, eating that much salt in one sitting feels dangerous to health. A sandwich advertised as “tradizionale” should deliver quality ingredients, not a salt bomb disguised as prosciutto. This is misleading, unpleasant, and potentially harmful — I truly hope they rethink how they prepare this item.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enrique Campano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZjAb8asgt8cqDkibec9EYM5aynbk0ihIbhMtiG3dh8HSiRW9F=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome food. They have another zone outside in the back. Expect to pay 10-15€ per person.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICawM7r4QE&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2021-7-20"},{"Name":"C (C)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdGqBenMvkw8vhuQVEGpuFEJt1h-ItwgeoZhQASjj4NnruiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice friendly waiters and good atmosphere. Tapas and drinks are nice, bocadillos are a little dry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MªLUISA GÓMEZ LÓPEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7yzejV8Xwn0nJhgiNqn9Qrtwk0osJn3XKM4EEhDbcsMr2jH2P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es muy básico, pero si lo que necesitas es un menú asequible cerca del Hospital Ramón y Cajal te lo recomiendo.
El precio del menú son 13,50 hay para elegir entre dos primeros, dos segundos y postre ó café.
Tengo que decir en favor del restaurante que la camarera nos llevó un par de tapas a cada unos de los comensales.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAgOSlmgE&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2025-1-28"},{"Name":"Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgbRXCGNpvfSgZ7OSiauheHkrIPyY1g1NronKEJk53I6RS0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"No me gustó mucho la verdad. El menú del día cuesta 12,90€, muy normalucho. No me gustó el sabor del secreto. La tarta de Ferrero no sabe a nada. Un tenedor que me dieron olía un poco raro. No recomiendo los bocadillos, tienen un pan un poco malo. Las raciones sí tienen buena pinta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3ho3qdQ&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2024-11-14"},{"Name":"Juanan Muñoz de Arenillas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViiHpyJUDEFJd-cSyH6AXXaAL9O31Gyu6cewm2QXbEqJkwxsSz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"🍽️CRÍTICA🍽️

- Sitio cercano al Hospital Ramon y Cajal donde comerte un buen menú a un precio económico y que te lo sirven bastante rápido. Tienes que saber dónde estás y que tampoco esperes mucho por un menú de 12€ más bebida con postre o café.

- El primero era revuelto de espárragos que estaba muy bueno, pero el segundo eran lacón a la gallega pero más que lacón parecían filetes de Sajonia.

✅A destacar:
- Su menú económico.

❌A mejorar:
- Nada ya que por 12€ que pretendes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5c_jTw&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2024-12-22"},{"Name":"Violeta P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUd38FRMkJ3xeW4enxtq2Dw1WQ-QFmvXr4-oJ5gI9ZhMvi-iUkOoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos tenido que comer varios días allí por tener un familiar en el hospital y la verdad que ha sido una experiencia buenísima. La comida está muy buena para ser de menú (en especial las patatas fritas de los acompañamientos y la tarta de queso). El personal es super atento y simpático. El menú de diario son aproximadamente 12.30€. Los platos combinados son muy grandes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxgIWVpQE&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2023-5-30"},{"Name":"Capitán Trotamundos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXS-urLxVAI4IBY6-H87MDjTJxi5xhjzSbbwVITLpJH9QK4LGdy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Al lado de un hospital no te sueles encontrar tanta amabilidad y ganas de trabajar. Los camareros están atentos a sus clientes y son muy cordiales.
La comida esta muy rica y sabrosa. Buena calidad en sus productos
Los baños limpios y en general todo en su sitio.
Volveremos porque merece la pena volver a probar esas papas fritas.

No soy de repetir dos veces el mismo lugar pero he de reconocer que esta vez han vuelto a superar. Bar lleno y con calma nos han colocado en una mesa, nos han servido estupendamente y una comida excelente. Me sigo quedando con las ganas de comer las papas fritas.
Tarta de queso excelente acompañado de un rico café.
No se  puede dar 6 estrellas pero se las merecen.
No se puede pedir más.

Tercer día y por fin he probado las papas fritas que me las han ofrecido y solo puedo decir que están excepcionales son caseras, hechas por ellos. En fin deliciosas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJqeGs5gE&fid=0x0:0xf0985cd0bea8c7de"],"When":"2023-7-19"},{"Name":"Andrea Cela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLuj2Cp1QWj8txThFuZcjRJC_4ni-AcE_JqIPieh0nMo8SfBgp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La camarera de la barra se tardó 15 minutos en atendernos, pese a estar nosotros en la barra y para colmo, sirvió la cerveza con desgana, arrojándola, en vez de servirla y sin tener un mínimo de contacto visual. Un trato poco profesional. El precio de la caña medio vacía fue de 2,90€.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Domínguez Páez Neurocirujano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmWI2Z5KTWhvGCXrL44Ff6C95KCV7g-chrfW4oRN6WtXhMDxV6Ag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Si quieres comer de menú bien y rápido es tu sitio. Gran variedad de primeros, segundos y postre + una bebida incluida.

Las mesas se mueven rápido y no hay casi espera.

Todo estaba muy bueno.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhPDYDEuipJ8CYxJAARrI0&fid=0x0:0x24e97a8f3da0c6d0"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Sergio Pr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7HCmxwiPqrNGVmHJMUJeAKin4rp57vgM6Y_On9YxRWzU-ZMN1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos a comer a AndeComo y la experiencia fue excelente. La comida es totalmente casera, se nota desde el primer bocado: platos elaborados con mimo, muy bien presentados y con un sabor espectacular. Todo lo que probamos estaba muy cuidado, con producto de calidad y raciones generosas. Se percibe claramente que aquí se cocina con cariño y atención al detalle.

Queremos destacar también el trato de Miriam y Amanda, que nos atiendieron con cercanía, amabilidad y profesionalidad, estando pendientes de todo sin resultar invasivas y haciendo que te sientas realmente a gusto.

Un sitio totalmente recomendable tanto por la comida como por el servicio. Sin duda, repetiremos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David F R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxcjqhLgynCxHqL4yqRxHhIPuax_a4tS1_gFLio9jnOU8Ybxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En el polígono de fuencarral el mejor bar para tomarte un café y un pincho de tortilla. La trabajadoras son de 10, súper amables y en general buena gente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAW3Qrtr00EBXiQpTCcAcoE&fid=0x0:0x24e97a8f3da0c6d0"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"María José Álvarez Parraga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6JWTVtrmSzVTn7z-wgvxs_LQM8wIsJvzJnnUGyteRcwBd2Kqjjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Servicio excelente,todas las chicas muy simpáticas y rápidas en su trabajo,calidad excelente,la comida exquisita.Bravo a todo el equipo de cocina, ambiente muy agradable.
Han sido unos días fabulosos en los que he disfrutado al máximo de esta impresionante comida que sirven.
Un 10 sobre 10 en todo.
Lástima que no esté cerca de casa.
Hay que ir para poder corroborar todo lo que he dicho","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHqIDWsQE&fid=0x0:0x24e97a8f3da0c6d0"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Maria Camacho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJr4Z9dXO4JHqAcAvW0AjWWZo1IAzf3hmu-q_gvD_3SLNXhmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos han traslado de oficina a la zona y ande como es como encontrar la casa de tu madre en mitad del desierto.La comida es casera, está muy buena y es de buena calidad.El servicio es excelente todas las camareras son un encanto además de profesionales.
De la zona es lo mejor que hay para comer bien.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pedro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtRRQt44SwQX7Uq6VQ97tzUrXdnx-9hkQ6fABhEFDAFMqCxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Comida buenísima, trato buenísimo y a muy buen precio. Creo que merece la pena alejarse un poco del centro para disfrutar del sitio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LaPerleNoire","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0Q-UR-n54sNgh0DBDYJubXtbR-BBgxnCby9udu9qJbQw5GA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"TREMENDO!! [{"Name":"Thomas Sørensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgyH09KRhQqP5eDMt-7xf31YmTI-cf8Q_ckVIhccgCrabw2Olk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you find yourself staying at the Hilton, or anywhere near, don’t waste your time and money eating in your hotel. Come here instead. After 10 days of work in Madrid and Las Palmas, this was hands down the best food of my trip. Chill, local and so incredibly tasty I want to order more. The Peruvian tamales is worth coming here for.
The host is super nice, beers and cheap and the vibe is pleasant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO9qKw3gE&fid=0x0:0x7d72fa7c1b56699a"],"When":"2022-6-9"},{"Name":"Chris Walkowicz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_hStQEAjBUS6lO5i6j3EaU77QbFZlRmQL3JQGKpg427FSHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was the best I had in Madrid. I highly recommend. The service was helpful, friendly, and timely. The menu has a good selection of options for a family with young kids. We had a variety of menu items and each one was as good as the next. We had an early dinner, so the restaurant was quiet. The neighborhood was pleasant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J Pearson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyru_ohQ8aTQ7YPG61wLG-8cgz-sOA83GMhcrIGDKm-itIzw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So what’s better? Spending USD 31 for a hamburger at the nearby Hilton or chilling at this awesome neighborhood restaurant/bar, with tasty food, friendly people, and reasonable prices?

So, for all you business travelers or others transiting through yet another sterile hotel, take a chance, exit your hotel, turn right, walk down to the street, take another right, walk down to the intersection, take another right and walk until you hit the sport courts. This place is on the left.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2kqT1Og&fid=0x0:0x7d72fa7c1b56699a"],"When":"2022-4-16"},{"Name":"Billy Hanrahan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDuzM6oTVno0Y6lvnlwefq_cF7m1fgeqlL36leRNXfyHf74L-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Not friendly to foreigners. I asked for a menu and was escorted outside and given directions to someplace else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jimmy B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfjVEjv_NSI00CnzDYdKtd2m5hgJRz1EyAWeeDYNg4ZAcHEA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great place to hang out, an absolute must while staying at the Hilton. 1€ beers and great food!! Thank you John for operating such a cool spot!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC234fRSw&fid=0x0:0x7d72fa7c1b56699a"],"When":"2022-5-2"},{"Name":"Steph “Travel Diva”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBpItKLDYeda7WoS289C7NA_EPVxgLoPAnT2xvCVTPdlRVv3I5Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited here while staying at the nearby Hilton (approx 4 min walk), and everything else was closed. The man who helped us seemed like the owner. He was extremely kind and helpful, made suggestions, and made the place feel like you were friends. Outdoor seating was available, although sadly, most patrons were smoking. The indoors was small but quaint. We ordered chicken sandwiches with fried egg on top, and it was quiet tasty and a good size. The menu was via qr code and was in Spanish and English. We took the food to go and received in a timely manner.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Incognito Potter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZkt2kOr0sXs0aT2Rw2QXWDiesO_mzdIZnjh8jKXHMbjQt3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Small little cafe behind the Hilton Hotel. Friendly service. The lady behind the counter spoke English. Only two small tables inside. No outside sitting. A group of 5 men were playing darts, so little wiggle room inside. We got order to go. It was a mixed bag. Not happy with Spanish omelet, but empanadas were okay. I did like the peruvian rice and beef dish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjLRoD1BiMp9c_x3ShdyuqSNXcOyazkVKAEiY4opWkIkkIxmQB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While staying at the Hilton we wanted to have a drink.  Being in close proximity to the hotel we gave this place a chance.  The service was excellent and we were treated to some complimentary tapas that were very good.  The beers were cheap and we had a great time.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Aurora Goncalves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUAKlln7FC6yxiZcvQOQ-LKHJOKYs0Nui393YW43HqdoWPyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved this little Peruvian spot in the north east side of Madrid.  Our waitress was Gissella and she was kind, attentive and welcoming. She provided amazing service the entire time.

We had the Seafood Rice, Chaufa Rice with Chicken and the Chicken Wings with Yellow Chilli Sauce. Of course we can not forget the delicious Passion Fruit Cheesecake which our waitress recommended! Delicious!

Was a perfect dinner before a long flight home. Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCkdkCo6VBexd1fIjV6Nl6_&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Justin Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfFn5gKIgbjm_CxE7--7WV_Mlw0-Pv2RTdYCMWPeQibzG7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Maria Jose was a fantastic server and bartender. The good was phenomenal and the Pisco Sours are a game changer!! Highly recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXSH25gWOGncWgWhs-USRL&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"K Jasper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIr41ON2FOYb4MpleSXCCZrZ3slq4TlzOIdJ4sc0ky-CumgZz-a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We saw this packed restaurant on the way to our hotel and stopped for the meal of the day. The prices can't be beat and 3 course meal with drink was delicious and fresh - just come early bc the sell out fast. Maria Jose made us feel welcome and was super helpful in making selections - she made us feel like family. Seafood paella was our favorite 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABA9HAun7WE9cEra7XPZjG&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Jessy Videnova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhPPCq4nbzjoVaQ4dv0syCnkQbVydMALxtF7D5nRZmQGVIHkIoaw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had dinner here last night. The food was delicious, also tried purple chicha for the first time and quite liked it. The stuffed potatoes was maybe a little salty for my taste, but still very good. Our waitress Maria Jose took great care of us :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJhpvfyJsvKrFkivIqcEWF&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Robert Peduzzi-Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkiWhmPAg_cvu6sycmtW0NNSnzQIImTzxO1nQ4JKynGlo42mUG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped for quick food after gym. Gissella was really friendly and helpful even though I dint speak the language. Food was good too, had grilled octopus leg.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAKt1dKL6pA6a-DIkWACuU&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Arkadiusz Krzemiński","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdQlsyNVW-7dywFT1HuNey1CBQH-vMqZjODHiaNUSCj5ksyWqo3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect food, Ceviche is excellent also Jumbo octopus was great. Desserts three leches and passion fruit cheesecake absolutely amazing. I would give six stars, service by Gisselle was really nice and friendly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1canBcDJUJzsjVxpbF2xo&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Dani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuYEQe5JSYqR5o18XBvMaemEHNuonef_T3IoNhYnLlc8vgY1U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic flavor of the Peruvian cuisine. Gissella was our server she was friendly & great customer service. We had the lomo Saltado as this is a staple for us to have at a Peruvian restaurant and this was the best one I have had. Flavorful, everything tasted fresh, perfectly seasoned & cooked. The chicken chaufa was also delicious the chicken was very tender and full of flavorful. My favorite was the juice we had all natural fresh fruit. Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enrico Gualtieri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEn1ZauA1Qcu_WHF9gpzKUALzutw9qLcOhhYx1TFKWx9ggNA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic Peruvian flavors and truly lovely service

the food was absolutely delicious! Every dish was full of flavor, fresh, and beautifully presented.

The place itself is simple but very charming. It has a cozy and friendly vibe that makes you feel at ease right away, without trying too hard to impress — just honest, good taste in both food and atmosphere.

A special thank you to Miscely, who took care of me. She was extremely kind, warm, and attentive, always smiling.

If you’re looking for authentic Peruvian food, and a welcoming atmospher, this place is a must. I will definitely be back — thank you, Miscely and team!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7EfaTXOPMvGBFXV8kOuI-&fid=0x0:0x942bdf9d053b6032"],"When":"2025-9-1"}]

[{"Name":"Nafisa Nazeer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0EwdsfmmWmEWRM3T6pzxPUBDx5jSuTiSvhn_hIk7LvS_tE3Ji=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m not sure why this place doesn’t have higher reviews. It’s wonderful!

We came because it was right next to our hotel and it was an excellent “goodbye Spain” meal. We thoroughly enjoyed the chicken fingers, sepulche, huevos y patatas, and the pan (bread) especially. And the brownie to finish off was splendid!!

Thank you for the delicious meal! We will remember you when we come back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ignacio Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHDVnJMoAarJHujdhCuZ2US1BchmxpeMDN7iKyeZAqUO9as1QjqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Don't know why it is not 4 stars, was a nice surprise and saved us a 1 hour trip to linear city 😅.
Entrecot was delicious, and fries and pimientos give it a really nice touch.
My wife got a bocadillo de chistorra, and was also delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENOo0Me76ZSnlwE&fid=0x0:0x8dd1cf0c7981dc30"],"When":"2025-6-1"},{"Name":"Nancy Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqtBuBFE7EP7GLa2YwclnpXeASRNbw_OVEoMj5kVmhslGRhtsr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Although this restaurant does not have a very good rating on Google, we had a very good experience here. We started off with gin tonics and fried anchovies, and then had the hake with seafood sauce. The hake was delicious and covered with mussels, prawns, squid, and baby shrimp. We had good service and the price seemed more than reasonable for the quantity and quality of the food. Another big plus for us was that it was serving dinner at 7:00 p.m.. We had an early flight the next day and didn't want to eat late.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRy4i_rAE&fid=0x0:0x8dd1cf0c7981dc30"],"When":"2023-5-3"},{"Name":"Linda Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFZj9HboYkN0GDPbxBcp2Y5ca_gQqNNgoECI1o73B07UZazA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved it! Great food, great service and very friendly","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"WeBradley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKu-dNdz9Y5q2engXztxlB-mrK3K0ofyKvmGvl8mS2QPrlwlw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great option to eat if staying at NH Barajas Hotel as it’s next door but too food and service are great!  I will definitely return if staying in the vicinity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpsLmmtQE&fid=0x0:0x8dd1cf0c7981dc30"],"When":"2023-8-14"},{"Name":"Sarah Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKClyAYtnJhOCe93v-frN2stWW9Sgj32P9ynmYOctwT5kx-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We visited this bar last Wednesday afternoon and felt that the price of the drinks were extortionate.
We live in Spain and we know what drinks cost in a local bar, which this is!
We were charged 11,80€ for a small bottle of beer and a Larios and tonic.
The service was poor and when we questioned the bill, the man said it's normal.
We would never return or recommend this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prabhav Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVT8sPSWaJrXpBkMXAfSOyI-pJXyA2-jewH5RQlsrXoeurUmtFBFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good place","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADm154d-HG19UdC3nq99YB&fid=0x0:0x8dd1cf0c7981dc30"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Victor Modesto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNVMlnuYtiNQQ0bENyaKsXV0f6VUZ3dLePG_Q-2hyk7_LOGUzRxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and food. Great location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOs-viYg&fid=0x0:0x8dd1cf0c7981dc30"],"When":"2022-7-13"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Peter Marycz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZ0Stc1R4hS0uKzIYV_T5JyIp1uZGsW5D4QVlZe7CBnHFbWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I just eat here this afternoon, Nov. 30, 2025 at approximately 2 PM (14 horas), and we found this restaurant to be GREAT! The facility is very very nice inside with much natural light. The staff was very attentive and exceptionally friendly, service was timed and performed very well. The food was FANTASTICO. Everything we had was exceptional. We rate everything here a 5 out of 5 and it is directly behind the Hotel NH Barajas, Madrid. Thank you ladies for your very kind and personable service.\nPeter and Denise","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scotdotcom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsESdipHOK8XQXZj08ZBTg5XT5a9B6pgxiWijT47kcGaJ-gvHN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I've been to this place a few times and it's, well.... okay. I've lived in this area for over 10 years and this is perceived as one of the better places but really it's not all that good. The service is mediocre,  the food is reasonable but overpriced, the installations are, well average. It's not a place you would say \"Wow! That was great! We must go back\". It tries to be classy but falls well short. There is a hole in the roof with a light hanging out of the ceiling and a fully set table underneath (See photo). We had the croquettes (all bechemel sauce and no ham), and the patatas bravas,  although original in their presentation (See photo) were €8 for basically one or two deep fried potatoes. The Kentucky chicken was quite tasty but the rest  was pretty average. I would expect better from a much less \"classy\" place and would pay about half as much as well. Dirty glasses, server (not a waiter by any stretch of the imagination) stretching across everyone at the table, pushing past our chairs to get to the next table instead of walking round the empty table behind us, cold food when it should have been warm..... It just wasn't a good experience. If you have the chance to try another place, and there are many good restaurants in this neighbourhood,  it might be your best option.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDk6t_0kQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x35be271fbbad118a"],"When":"2019-2-19"},{"Name":"Elizabeth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGcEpTfzDCyoqcoBsZxcEwlY-HSqfVVZNt5VJ8BiQs6aLoZZGMhw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered the Arroz Negro (black rice) Paella. It was pretty good despite looking scary! Sat down and about 15 minutes layers we got a menu... another ten minutes later to order a drink and although we told the waiter we were ready to order food he ignored us. 10 minutes later my beer came but my wife’s wine was missing we just got a glass and the waiter said he would be right back. Ten minutes later we ran out of patience and I went in and asked to pay for my beer so I could move on to another place; the waiter was not sure who I was... I clarified and he proceeded to insult me and say we had ordered a wine too. I pointed out that he had not delivered it and he said he was about too despite the fact that there was no wine anywhere in on this tray. He kept saying that this was a terrace and things take time and how this was not a Chinese restaurant. Avoid this place unless u have a lot of time and patience","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7wt0kncYzLApkVxxBuYTRnwhv_WiFYz2JjB6pdMnraXVBHSOW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Service terrible, food excellent, coffee excellent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE2p6qTQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x35be271fbbad118a"],"When":"2017-11-30"},{"Name":"Jakub Hvězda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRwcfp5v9tlebxcgHxB5h7iqWxrOv_fqSp1zaAQdxPgYxEQReQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The waiter let me wait for 25 minutes just to tell me that he kitchen is closing in 20 minutes and he can't take my order.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanne McDonnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvjIoQfAJGKCFDOjbCoftuEH5i2xRb9p7wae3Ohca-k8Cvw7o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place.. atmosphere and food.. staff friendly and service good","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"stephen mason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgHWyEhLBX53VilLUYIz_trUTxz9ezkHjZQLixRp9t46TU1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My first visit to Lupara, as I was staying in Madrid overnight whilst  transiting to Abu Dhabi. Near to hotel I was staying at. What a find. The food is amazing, and as a limited Spanish speaker the team were brilliant.
Meal Recommendations were spot on for me.. the food feels very 'homely' a 'mama's kitchen' kind of vibe.. the menu was hand written, and a couple of items explained to me as I could not.translate. a hidden gem. X","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR2t6ZJg&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2023-4-23"},{"Name":"Parker Frost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIElrh1mKZcnWu4wLei6z0oUw-B_q0sLLrZo91xW-eQEpqStg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is next level.  We were staying by the airport due to an early flight the following day.  So glad we did.  Best meal we had on our 10 day trip to Spain.  Service was unreal, followed up by unreal food that has such an attention to detail your mind will be blown.  No menu....they ask what you like, how hungry you are, explain their suggestions, and then start bringing you round after round of food.  Was so good and great way to end the trip.  Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ghaith Jalajel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUo_ICUWwpLXLPzlPWUiPOb5Lbtp7QQSjYJ0dc2sbcHr9FH3TLa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and brilliant service
Thank you very much","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fran Villalba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUU64Y0j7a5GswSCOoGMdoaZ4I-CDJdmvb-epN6JPFFPLHNol5r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casa de comidas que basa su carta en la cocina italiana con referencias de la cocina española, dirigido por Daniel Vangoni, propietario de otros restaurantes como Derzu Bar, también en Barajas. Cocina creativa, llena de sabor, en un ambiente familiar, con una carta corta y apetecible. Si está Daniel, la atención es excelente y te asesora perfectamente. El resto del personal de sala, al menos en la última visita, podría mejorar. Me parece un restaurante diferente donde encontrar platos interesantes y únicos, con un ticket de 40€ por persona aproximadamente. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvwqRZcPsbGE7IbTsS1bN9&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Señor X","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsQETZ14S_QJjT4B_cUIok7WGNc5FBcSS7l-nM6eL3HVvK4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pedazo de italiano en barajas. Pedimos la pizza de chipirones que es increíble y una pasta carbonara y una putanesca, se nota que trabajan ingredientes de calidad y las cantidades están muy bien (las fotos son medias raciones).
Sin duda volveré porque estaba muy muy rico todo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeNbKnkUl5vIA8wsr_ewGH&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Agus 244","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-4KbmSrpT5Oe5bTJ2BQjrk1xgsjvUFhl_9cwbyp4X7GpdRNKQrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Restaurante sin carta, en el que te proponen los platos del día. Producto de temporada bien ejecutados en el que el producto principal destaca. Verduras y pescado en su punto. Pan 7.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCUXvrut1oZ-PMhFmpxAS0&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Ana Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBwrZtLCISvVTlldjxUJut4uTKYROsAh0bOAm68hhmCbAoutQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un espectáculo de comida, buena calidad y bien ejecutado. No tienen carta, te aconsejan según alergias y gustos y es muy recomendable oír lo que aconseja aunque estoy segura que cualquier plato sería un acierto.
Los postres también buenísimos… el vino que pedimos espectacular igual, no tiene un pero, buena presentación, trato y calidad. Precio acorde a la calidad.
Espero que duren mucho por la zona","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRncHyqAERQfMqte1lRJBs&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Patricio Aravena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcbHLtLLXfYqB_SWePZKIR2q5qLidSIbC-ro7teFYUDogmFn3pgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una vez más lo diré , si quieres comer rico en barajas este es el lugar indicado !
Siempre saldrás sorprendido y con ganas de volver .
En esta ocasión probamos el Parmentir de patatas con trompeta 🎺 .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5NrKTm5bHeTmuqiKdORvy&fid=0x0:0xe241f11ccbb0ee75"],"When":"2025-10-30"}]
