user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Yineiry Alarcon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxaw6FA92GD3zO0C2JTTvBfY55wiXVuziNhjBYqkA_1QarVse_lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to come here after reading and seeing all the positive reviews and we left so happy after trying this restaurant. The owner was so sweet, he explained everything to us and we’ll definitely come back. We got La Secreta and all the meals come with the Paella, a sauce of your choice, bread, and your choice of beverage all for €15. This is a great deal for college students or anyone in general. Definitely recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9vEGi2zH7MehO68i6XLCC&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Erik Gustavsson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQUvH1eOvJYJUmZ_3DQchuYGMXLOINSn9rbINnCkOldXa3NWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINaXajRgDpcYxzYr_KKbMXRsIjm0oyortCVRXrqFRDW3nHD3M9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Relacion calidad-precio genial. 12.50 el menu o 14.50 si es de las especiales. Nos incluyó paella individual (buena cantidad para uno) pan con el alioli a elegir (recomendamos el de pimenton picante) y postre o cafe. Además no esperamos ni 10 minutos para comer.
Lo mejor a resaltar del negocio fue la atención.  De las que ya no se encuentra facilmente. Se nota que quieren que salga bien y la gente se vaya contenta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvOKfx3rMNRoflk1mHJeE2&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Elena R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdiXzoHcBCrmEI1aSBjtNRoOY_y_FgFt2bf4fiQnMWfTBTYTmmlw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La experiencia fue increíble!! Pedimos 2 menús "individuales" (porque la verdad que la paella es bastante grande) y estaba todo riquísimo. Hay varios sabores para elegir, pero siempre conservando la esencia de la paella. Nos atendieron genial y la calidad-precio es inmejorable, volveremos sin duda😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAskicDXUK2TTEr1MX3hGgS&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Carlos Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKY16IRpisuPPZ224yp0sMcvcUWk2w__vJZa9RtTBSZdmKJPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos 4 personas a Pae-Ya y la experiencia fue excelente.
Comimos paella muy rica, el alioli espectacular, y todo acompañado de bebidas.
Pagamos unos 60 € en total, relación calidad-precio más que justa.
Lo mejor de todo fue el servicio: la amabilidad del dueño y de su esposa marca la diferencia. Cercanos, atentos y muy profesionales.
Sin duda, un sitio para repetir y recomendar. Les doy un 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCN767u_WcFmjn9n7t5qyYA&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Jose Maria Viso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5SsGPSp5eFTveUni4aVGmWjwNoScgnb4MyOzey86NsZfO-tH0IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Si te gustan las paellas, este sitio es un acierto total.
La comida está de diez, con ingredientes de calidad y un sabor espectacular. Además, el precio es justo, muy adecuado para la calidad que ofrecen.
El servicio es rápido y súper eficiente, así aunque uno podría pensar que una paella llevaría su tiempo y que estamos acostumbrados a que sea de encargo en cartas aquí no es así y es perfectamente factible estar comiendo en 10 minutos.
Las raciones son generosas, sales más que satisfecho (¡aquí nadie se queda con hambre!).
Tienen un montón de variedades de paella, para todos los gustos diria, yo me he dejado recomendar y sobresaliente.
En resumen: buena comida, buen precio, buen servicio… ¿qué más se puede pedir? ¡Recomendadísimo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKCRHe7SxZ1WJgeagDWL5y&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Jaime García Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ52eNuhrDlDBt30e8Va-OKKVnqimNZfk1z4d6NCg5y3TAWDV8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos ido tres personas a comer hoy. Hemos comido tres arroces con sus bebidas y pan por 15€ cada uno. El servicio genial. Las han preparado en 10 minutos. El personal simpatiquísimo. Los arroces espectaculares. Y tienen 4 tipos de alioli, a cual más rico. Lo recomiendo 100%. Yo seguro que repito. Hay envío a domicilio también por su web, Uber eats y Glovo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBixdLTXWj3vT4KXJGxSoP0&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"juan suarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8y0Ur6dip0K0fhaySGSRyOyjS3XyykRdhlDk5blAX4kJONafk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Qué descubrimiento!
Siempre suelo comer por la zona en los mismos sitios, pero hoy he encontrado esta maravilla.
A partir de ahora, una buena paella aquí será cita obligada al menos una vez por semana.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhgDkCgjInw02A7msipHbI&fid=0x0:0x45547f158d77c6a4"],"When":"2025-10-15"}]

We ordered 2 of the many options. Very tasty and good  quality ingredients, I liked the crispy bacon and sweet bun, the meat was perfectly grilled.

Good value for money, and even more If you choose to have the set menu (including refill-drink and fries), that's what we had!

The only down side I found, is probably that in one of the burgers, it was a bit oily for my taste, but that's me!

I still have to try the shakes!  So I'll come back some other time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICGgMfSlwE&fid=0x0:0xd298417662e335ee"],"When":"2021-10-16"},{"Name":"Jorge Segura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqElQBOwhwNrD2o58tla49BD6q0vrGX6qCTq-yqdunmzvWaXIByA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved the food and the service! [{"Name":"irene rey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCLWIqe9W-gD_qFy3GkqsSwTzkpb_pRCGlF0wPVrjH3CTAzwRV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Il Duomo di Firenze is truly the place to go if you are looking for great Italian cuisine! Located conveniently near my workplace, this restaurant has become my go-to spot for Friday dinners. The location couldn't be more perfect for a quick escape into a little piece of Italy.

The dishes are nothing short of exceptional. Every meal I've had has been packed with authentic flavors, the ingredients taste so fresh, and you can tell there's a lot of love and tradition behind each plate. My personal favorite is their tagliatelle fruit di mare. Every bite feels like a luxury!

The atmosphere here is just as inviting. Whether I'm coming in for a casual meal or a celebratory dinner, the cozy yet elegant ambiance always makes the experience special.

One of the best parts of Il Duomo di Firenze is the staff. They are incredibly friendly and attentive, always making sure you're comfortable and well taken care of without being intrusive.

I can't recommend this place enough. Whether you're nearby like me, or just looking for an authentic Italian dining experience, Il Duomo di Firenze will not disappoint! Five stars all the way!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vimal Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbMf5xfPjxfGzKAGkOKU-ytuUSGhYwmXYXxAWFJ5WbP81wLqV4ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food with plenty of options being a vegetarian. Food was tasty and made according our requests. I would recommend anyone in the area to try for sure and you won't be disappointed. [{"Name":"Asher Mendelsohn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqRvYW-a_lSUaf5iTtmw6DBfVcf7TfVR491K28IHEfLs9SorY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a really amazing meal here. First of all, just flew in and the restaurant was nearby to the airport. Upon arriving the waiter, Daniel, was very kind and served us promptly. The restaurant was empty when we arrived, but as soon as we started ordering many people started pouring in till the restaurant became packed! This is a great sign and it’s clear it’s popular with the locals. The dishes were served very fast and they were extremely delicious. First dish was a free appetizer which was a cheese and ham on bread dish, like a mini pizza. That was delicious. We also had so many amazing dishes like the Jamon iberico, seafood paella, grilled scallops, miso cod croquets and more. All were super delicious and it’s quite hard to choose which one is the best! Personally I think the paella was really good. Daniel was a great waiter and he was able to handle all the customers at the same time and service was great. To top it off, he also gave us free chocolate balls as soon as we were about to go, and they were delicious! Would highly recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvnbq-0sa0yt_GMXHwa-Jh&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Gabrielle Mendelsohn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyhcrZfxFpTDcUQerksArAI0RWRrJwwxiYIhm_Blh-vnbKIpri=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff are very accommodating, as they allowed us to store our luggage in the restaurant. Food was absolutely delicious and was quickly delivered. We were even served a chocolate dessert afterwards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0rOU8LR5LNk3qwD365ie8&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Amir “Oveis” Honarmand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzL9l-YFifA6s2XG8LSTAyKEj5Xump-PYYg0H8asI298FmylRZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and good vibes. The waiter didn’t speak much English but was very helpful and pleasant. Overall a nice experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxjI7JOHhQlQ7KWK0uqGMe&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Simon Dodson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6KpGYgFF7pWkaPWN2izETR7H59INJu9yFfYR6fuVa227nbxc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This a little hidden gem.
My friends and I went there two nights consecutively, whilst we stayed nearby.
The staff were extremely friendly and very helpful. They were also very happy to see us when we returned.
The food was very reasonably priced if not cheap. It tasted amazing and felt like it had been cooked with passion and care. When picking what food to have, I found it very hard because it all looked and tasted wonderful. As the prices were so good, we chose to go with many little plates.
I can’t recommend this bar highly enough and will definitely be revisiting on my next trip to Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SouTex Traveller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMdlRrgerw3Snu85MB3W70R6EBUswRpWNirT-fS1SqifT6VJ1a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty tapas and wine near the Madrid airport. Popular with locals but easy walk from several airport hotels to get first, or last, taste of Spanish food and culture.
Service was great, food came quick and was hot and as good as any we had in Spain!
Be advised, Spanish culture expects a leisurely pace at meal time…servers won’t pester you or bring you a check without asking…so, enjoy your vacation - what’s the rush?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb86nYrQE&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2024-7-29"},{"Name":"John Allan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOSTQDCUT9vPAw0RuKEgENuzVQusjVo6jE7ryjhT-bEcByiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic bar for beer and tapas. The menu is great and the staff are too. I recommend the salt crust seabass and their paella","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPnEz8m5k9KdRQ&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2025-5-26"},{"Name":"Raul San Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4coKhv4F9HU2SyxXRmtAeA_eu4cl-pVqiOj9-7O4FHPK9GpEl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Arrived very early for dinner, they still served us, so that was appreciated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUx8PFD6M5b9uifKE7KnGd&fid=0x0:0xd090c88722305182"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Mick Hoover","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaLW_bmzFxgmLp7gr8p62SVTk3_TeXg1WOHVrwAoBgM2UNVCrv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a gem of a restaurant. We had an overnight layover and found this restaurant just down the road from our hotel. Food was excellent and so was the service. Couldn't recommend this enough.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Filetes si podrían ser más gorditos ahora que lo pienso. 😉. Ellos encantados siempre","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adrián López García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRNQydDZS1zsAMCs3Zwx3Kx5XKR3Gf68nmRZy6q83DElqF53h8Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡No se por donde empezar!: El servicio es excelente, y todo lo que se te da para comer es exquisito y casero. Aparte del menú, tienes una amplia gama de bocatas cuyo precio no supera los 2€. Aquí también puedes encontrar varios snacks, que no encontrarás menos rebajados en tu chino o en tu bazar cercano. El servicio es estupendo, alegre y divertido. El cocinero prepara todo ahí mismo, y siempre te logrará sacar una sonrisa de la cara. En resumen: Recomiendo, tanto a alumnos, como a profesores y padres, visitar este lugar, ya que es una experiencia culinaria, que puede que no te esperes.\nEsta reseña ha sido redactada por Adrián López García, de 3ºA.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOMU_F_SxsFHGrRNXCCHJ10QW6mleM_RebhCi876JPBZRVZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buen sitio, bonito, con una gran variedad de bocadillos y snacks (entre otras cosas). Recommendations: set up a nonsmoking area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jc san","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgdIxd4mJTmDhI79X4CU0o2GNOemwX-vTyHs6BrZ-oULOJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"TOURISTS BEWARE!!!!! I just don't go there anymore.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P Gallardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvq1LoOAURd9rJ0dvC6mvmTuyDEwP0z1G7idOZ9wWUxmX-I6TK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is another shop for the brand inside the suburb market. It has some bakery and fresh out of the oven bread.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyBEoy62o8wE_gkZwIJx9RhNiA6L2rb0Dsvcd4GTH3FEboBzw9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice quality bakery","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Antonio Alonso Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2YQJciZg3UrFJcSTIv4imw3Bzg7bDiiIabobmnIK4lDgMtQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Too comercial,..not personal","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MariovilloSo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVXDEe2lhqZvPvEES4UleEsWwR2YahVb1oGSsUUlmvXB5rr5TT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El pan bueno les llega a las 10. El trato es fantástico y siempre hay varias personas dispuestas a atenderte con una sonrisa. Los panes y galletas de muy buena calidad/precio. Yo voy uñas dos o tres veces por semana pues el pan te lo dan parte si quieres para congelar. Lo mejor las hogazas, la de trigo normal o la moña las de mejor precio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzgUkZhOR-pK4sY5JNvcz5&fid=0x0:0xf43f2571ff61ba2f"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Andrea PD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjwAO5-DuPFXCPc_o5-JKJR-ZRJvNloc9HulLSoWnyLZBB-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vamos a menudo a esta panadería/pastelería y siempre compramos sus panes de masa madre, ya sean hogazas o barras. Especial mención para la gallega de masa madre y la hogaza de espelta y quinoa, que están espectaculares.

Los pasteles y dulces de ocasión también son muy buenos —el roscón de reyes, por ejemplo, es impresionante—. Es cierto que algunos panes y bollos no los hacen en su propio horno, y se nota algo en la calidad; por ejemplo, los pain au chocolat parecen ser congelados.

Lo que realmente marca la diferencia con respecto al local de Avenida Cantabria, y lo que nos hace preferir venir a este, es el trato. Valeria, Helen y Daisy son encantadoras, siempre amables y atentas, nada que ver con la atención del otro local, que deja bastante que desear.

Además, aquí la máquina de cortar el pan deja las rebanadas más gruesas, algo que también preferimos.

En conclusión, una panadería/pastelería muy recomendable, con un pan excelente y un equipo que hace que quieras volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vanessa Vieites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvsQdAnLo3w9tDe-Tvzz5cYk9iv4gAiqHe1KOPl1WgJD4Zs4tO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Magnífica. El sabor es maravilloso en todos los productos que he comprado y la atención una maravilla como siempre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOv5uISHgYHGiAE&fid=0x0:0xf43f2571ff61ba2f"],"When":"2025-5-16"}]

Un lugar clásico en la Alameda de Osuna.

Hace menos de un mes ha cambiado de propietario. Fui a disfrutar de un buen desayuno y de paso, comprobar personalmente, si las buenas expectativas se podían confirmar, puesto que también lleva uno de los más reconocidos bar - restaurante de la Alameda de Osuna.

Este fue perfecto. El pan con tomate y la tortilla de patatas estaban deliciosas! Además pedimos zumos de naranja y dos cafés.
El mesero fue muy amable siempre, incluso cuando en un momento el lugar se llenó completamente.
Recomendado!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnt9itwQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf8bf23eb290a98"],"When":"2024-10-11"},{"Name":"Daniela Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUySM1q6osD9PnGq0fOl7f8oFSVcBdq23gcGnZh44RpfQJr1aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente lugar. Buenos precios.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLx54VhR4s59zXKtnDibxCNWxuVep0H1M7qFA3t5Zo1Q1ChZPUsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Desayunamos con mi familia y es una muy buena y recomendada opción para comer algo en la zona. Aunque si tuviera que quedarme con algo, lo haría con Rulo, el camarero más amable y atento que he conocido nunca. Siempre con una sonrisa en la cara, ¡se quedó con nuestra comanda desde el primer día! [{"Name":"Edgard Leysen Jozef","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLktnSJ1KtLp2E-igbKkGpdg_SMEoIlMQSgGwos-wUFDVI3MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tipical, and perfect service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javi Perez Maestre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvXDCPHIgKViKfwZ6UtCE69RHe2lZpCJ6wpv57sBCpb-xCuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Bar El Tazón es un auténtico tesoro escondido que no está bien destacado en Google, pero que merece ser descubierto. La experiencia allí fue simplemente increíble, tanto por la comida como por el ambiente. A pesar de su ubicación discreta, este bar se destaca por sus tapas y raciones deliciosas y a un precio muy asequible.

Las tapas que probamos, como los tequeños y los huevos rotos, fueron espectaculares. Cada plato estaba lleno de sabor y preparado con esmero. Además, la relación calidad-precio es insuperable, lo que hace que este lugar sea ideal para disfrutar de una buena comida sin gastar demasiado.

Lo que realmente hizo nuestra visita especial fue la atención de los chicos que nos atendieron. Son muy profesionales y amables, y se aseguraron de que tuviéramos todo lo que necesitábamos para pasar un rato agradable. Veníamos de una mala experiencia en otro lugar, el Martes 13, y ellos lograron subirnos la moral con su excelente servicio y deliciosa comida.

Dejo algunas fotos de las tapas que probamos para que puedan ver la calidad de los platos. En resumen, el Bar El Tazón es un lugar altamente recomendable por su comida, precios y excelente atención. Sin duda, volveremos pronto.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6Ljs6gE&fid=0x0:0x6c62b73f838e7c8e"],"When":"2024-7-22"},{"Name":"Pedro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmi80YHTjJH5H3EiBU7XquiE3P9uIQGVUcM6hMFJ9_kHEXPDh4Mg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente trato , incluso con mucha gente no espere nada y fue todo muy rapido,limpio, muy bien coordinados,buena calidad ,yo me comí un pincho de tortilla y estaba muy buena,100x100 recomendable.
Seguramente que volveré","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJm6WGpAE&fid=0x0:0x6c62b73f838e7c8e"],"When":"2023-7-23"},{"Name":"Monica Revilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxjjv8qsRuvJNCr__3h3Zdgi9Y7CkxcEBWwQA56v39XaAk2W8m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hoy estuvimos muy temprano en el aeropuerto de regreso mamá y yo decidimos tomar un desayuno fuera, 3l lugar es muy acogedor, el baño limpio como los que me agradan porque eso de ir a un lugar donde el baño esté sucio no va. Tofo estuvo riquísimo el café, el zumo, las tostas y ni que decir del mollete de jamón que comí 😊
El personal muy amable, voy a regresar pronto estos lugares donde te atienden bien te atrae y mas cuando todo está deli deli 😋 😋
Gracias por su buena atención.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDV59-YZA&fid=0x0:0x6c62b73f838e7c8e"],"When":"2023-12-17"},{"Name":"Eduardo Herranz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9wx-s1RRMi8kcGtwK0wgzLQny9NxZ-mxxiYKftMTYtdJjrRSd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El personal es atento. Pedí una copa en la terraza, y lo primero que me sorprendió fue que, en lugar de servirla en la mesa como marca la normativa, me la trajeron servida en una copa, pero la mezcla venía por separado en lata. En segundo lugar, no era el alcohol que había solicitado; esto ocurrió no una, sino dos veces. En la segunda ocasión, al comentárselo, se mostró reticente a cambiarme la copa, insistiendo en que era el alcohol correcto y que no era de garrafón. Para colmo, nos cobraron 8 euros por cada copa, un precio que dudo mucho sea el habitual, y nos sirvieron garrafón junto con una mezcla de marca blanca en lata. Una auténtica vergüenza.(14/3/2025 a las 23:00)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raúl González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPrJOiucjR8HZHg8ar3E4VqaNkXMgS-ICxprK8wj9Tumq-r7dC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lugar tranquilo en el que desayunar. Buen atendimiento y rápido. Buenos precios. Muy recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Oleg David","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-RzghBEUCOvJ0iEL5-GIB413JO3U7kth5TRN6Z4-xHqgJVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una pequeña joya entre las altas torres que la rodean. Un local cálido y muy acogedor. El café de calidad y servido correctamente. Los mini croissant deliciosos. Buenas atención.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBisvqkOHczaoHXWLcKAwgy&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Deusdedith Torrealba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3gY_xBiWB2K8PqsCcpb3Bo37pYQd3OiocXdbfUB0-6Ki23q0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una joya en Madrid... Ukiyo es de esos sitios que te encantan desde que entras. El sándwich Ukiyo esta buenísimo y el bubble tea de papelón es algo que todo el mundo debería probar. El lugar tiene una decoración preciosa. un ambiente súper agradable y la atención es de diez.
De verdad, una pequeña joya en Madrid que vale totalmente la pena visitar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeogpDp7DOI7kvdnvMZAVH&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Francisco R S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHBqNtT43y_PQXWoAFVlPzdyT7WHaao58BTxuCinHzXVpuayihQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los dos mochis que pedí: pistacho y mango muy ricos, se notaba la frescura y lo sedosa que estaba la pasta de arroz que es lo entre le da la diferencia a estos postres.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQsVXOs0QO__A56DE2aLs1&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"José Quiroz Lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2-Hnmi23jt4HfWfe2NSwOVijJJzkptOSrph_Z-xqYGK7XkeNd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy recomendado! Pedimos una tosta de atún, un trío de baos, café y Mochis. Todo muy rico, el café delicioso y los baos fueron una gran sorpresa. La música, el ambiente y el servicio increíbles. Definitivamente recomendado. (También tienen terraza)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB49zd3owDFEviWIEeXA-SY&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"Samael David","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVHBIYhYRZHAS_krPfTLd1HO7yEzq0JayXCJGwLPWxSmqIuw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lo primero la atención de los chicos un 10!, luego toda la comida y bebida super rica, vamos por partes:

-Bebidas: capuchino Colombia 100%, muy muy rico me sorprendió con una crema super buena y el matcha también, un sabor bastante puro.

-Comida: pedimos 2 mochis (choco-coco y pistacho) la verdad que muy buenos, no se si serán caseros pero los volvería a pedir.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwck_1I8VwlIYLxHWIs9DW&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Veronica R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw2lUoFxU4tPoDwDto904JtHiQ1vImR7ZeTO__SuKQiMFCTTHS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me comí la tosta de salmón mas deliciosa de mi vida!! El bocadillo de pollo también esta muy rico. De los mochis probé de mango, nutella, limón y fresa y me gustaron todos, están muy bien hechos. La tarta de zanahoria deliciosa y fresca. Atención 10/10. Sin duda en mi próxima visita a Madrid volveré!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ-hp9ienfS03wE&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"Pablo Mora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNWKDZtUlmyazPDvqcDa7S-sJTs0VhkDl2uPPBozFIR31v7w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un rinconcito para evadirte, disfrutar de un riquísimo té, matar el hambre con alguno de sus baos o disfrutar de sus mochis, yo sin ser un amante de ellos, el de turrón me pareció sublime!
Y el chaval que nos atendió, majísimo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAr9SsDa4a8wOMkgDtpHouk&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Andrea D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJe6dzdcWNhSoi3ONyOVW-UCZoO6z8sCJC4jKKJZYzVgvXjDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un agradable descubrimiento. El ambiente ideal para relajarse y los Mochis y el matcha latte de 10. Además la atención es muy buena. Con ganas de volver para probar más cosas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCg-kacIBYEEx2N91THmzml&fid=0x0:0x1c9f98357c2ebdc4"],"When":"2025-12-17"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Grayson Steinberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0FM-DTGeRq-ekiimGFBlFHH05AKAAIJzcPJgJV79ZCQwiCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Before I get into why I've left a three-star review, I'd like to point out that the service was excellent. Absolutely no complaints there.

My issue has to do with the false advertising on La Desayunería's new menu.

Context: We've always been big fans of La Desayunería, particularly for their pancakes (which are or, at least until recently, were the best American-style pancakes you could get in Madrid) and their marvellous skillet potatoes, drenched in cheese and sprinkled with generous doses of onions and peppers.

In fact, the first photo, taken back in August 2021 during one of our first visits to their Chueca location, features these very potatoes. They were so delicious, the skillet potatoes alone were enough to convince my partner to pay numerous repeat visits over the following three years, with and without at least half a dozen friends who we also converted into loyal customers.

Fast forward to today, about six months since our last visit. Besides the fact that prices of most dishes had increased an average of $2 to $4 in the interim, the skillet potatoes we ordered today did not remotely resemble our favorite dish (exhibit B: the second photo I've shared). Can the real skillet potatoes please stand up?

Not only were these alleged "skillet potatoes" a sad, microwave-reheated attempt at home fries, they were a world away from what La Desayunería had previously advertised as skillet potatoes.

I never imagined you guys would stoop this low, but I'm afraid that today I was deeply disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoyPmVfg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I like this place a lot. Visited a couple of times with family. Children friendly.
Generous portions, good prices. Friendly atmosphere.
I really like jars with cold water that are served directly when you sit at no cost!
My daughter enjoys pancakes so much! Last time we try those chocolate brownies - yummy 😋
Fries are tasty. The burger is good, especially the bread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZ7qCU_wE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-10-1"},{"Name":"RC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlKVKTxDPdnEjvP8YmcYdXkT1KBu0mDRTwyMd5NwPqlZxCSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I ordered the grilled cheese sandwich with fried chicken!! The sandwich was nice but the fried chicken could be better ... it looked as it was re-heated... dry and hard to chew.

The place is well located in the restaurant area and tables available without reservation required.

They could have a lunch deal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPwKXqiAE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Lily Fune","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLl_Nd3Rk9TemDO5HAFBYBfC7yOxBhtbYOSS5LE1Bpet_x7-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our server name Islam was extremely nice and approachable.  He spoke English, which made our experience much less stressful and very helpful throughout our visit. His friendly attitude and great communication really made a difference. Excellent service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Montse Aroca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzgqSuZc3XOaq0dJtpI7NoIw6Scv-M9mhCfK9mYdEfhrlz0xFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and amazing food. I love that they served the food with a glass of tap water","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6nCYiMVvCZ_QFkOQVdDsN&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Amanda Donnelley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8InSUuIi1XDi6HdPNsvA5PbUmWTZuF3UUM0Ol9_In8dX2gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Only go for pancakes everything else sub par.  Service was slow, grilled cheese and fries were cold, fries said hand cut but they came from the freezer.   Pancakes were delicious and fluffy, huge plate of food.  The table was sticky and the tables were packed into this location so made it hard for families to get to get to tables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxr5OGYg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Solis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkg6bjGMNoP_8Y-DXy7p0TtXTe2VEANXFKMEShZlC4sjHCf7GnBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of the coffee places in Caliedo, this is my favorite. They have good coffee and cake. It was also not too crowded, while the playlist was awesome. I can't wait to comeback for the pancakes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwzPvMdw&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"António Ribeiro Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiXNy-z8DnPA3Ry_rM-vu5gz7taDMlJUFJ_jas4EzJpjuTQWXr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Avenger is known by smashing and destroying pancakes, reason why he told me, the storyteller to pick a pancake place and let him know, that's what I did.

He wants to throw a Divorce Party for his Divorce Tour in Madrid, and in his last podcast episode, "How to Throw a Divorce Party and Ignore being Alone" he told about the power of pancakes which he started liking by watching The New Day, a wrestling faction composed by Kofi Kingston, Xavier Woods and Big E. He feels the power of positivity and how people are happy by consuming them.

If you're looking for healthy pancakes this is not your place, I was looking for that, but on the other hand, if you're looking for diabetes and sugar rush, this is your place, the service is pretty fast, which would let The Creator happier than ever, it would be even quicker than he would get back to "action" , and they keep you hydrated by giving you a glass of water, the only non-sugary thing.

Ventilation system is quite good, if you wanna work there's space, and music is from your God's playlist, of course! The bathroom it's mixed but big, you can relax inside while changing your diaper.

In general pretty good, and in an area with a lot of options, Throw your party and have some calories","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRz8jNxQE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-4-13"}]

We came over here and we found their short but very explicit menu of baguettes and sandwiches. Super fresh and tasty, highly recommend. ❤️🙌","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRNZIiU0w4Q0kwtjiECX9QvAjMWOOXz4hg9Yu75LxSqKu2Umw1XA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food, gentle service and fair prices","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guille Ulibarri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsADL8octpaWehTm-jesRG7-C4m5P876IDdaoEe_yrMNGDBFBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I went there during my lunch break. It wasn't packed and most of the food in the menu are sandwiches.
There are no waiters to take your order, you do it with your phone, so why on Earth did I wait 40 minutes for a sandwich?
I had to ask the waiter twice what was wrong with my order and she kept saying "it's going to come soon".
I know it's Spain and here the customer isn't always right, but when I mentioned that I waited for 40 minutes to eat, the waiter just gave me an ugly look.

The place is elegant and cozy, sophisticated but laid back ❤️ The hot choco was delicious and thick, the flat white well prepared and the food tasteful! Will definitely come back and can't recommend enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLHKDQ2qgtOVhog_GqaHLv&fid=0x0:0xc8982e386d0e9499"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Naila Bafli Cobo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgAGFCgqNpicq28HHyCpJI60J-NijJbZeHLxemE8R1WiZfjBY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I happen to pass by on my way to home and get coffee occasionally, inside it is always clean and bright, it feels open and comfortable, not noisy. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shoresh Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4qGojFVpNlx6M2REiBX9Q_ZR5awgv8jjKTWKP7ZgZCAOcjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing spot for a quality brunch or dinner,very warm atmosphere and helpful staff, their food quality stands out in freshness and flavour,probably the best in Madrid.I'll definitely come back for more and so should you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC54123lBl_HcFGa9LVW2dr&fid=0x0:0xc8982e386d0e9499"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"lucia ajuria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrIB8b1KPukiHndnSTPOPsTKQ5YF86UPLzDpdnLhwrTTEf6ZzW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dog friendly. Admiten perros","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonio Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrwOHHtGnc609Pap9PHZ_aoVXEcuaLuX8JCImHoBj8mrZ4QOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Local muy agradable, una terraza ideal para cuando haya bien tiempo.
El producto es de muy buena calidad tanto la parte dulce como la salada nos han gustado mucho.
El café que es de especialidad es realmente bueno y además lo han ejecutado muy bien
Es un local que no es nada ruidoso","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBt2HwYovVoN2nfnIDFE8Ie&fid=0x0:0xc8982e386d0e9499"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Rubén Lucas Contreras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj0nbpiC_8o4FXHXVigTz8Vs-NP9g4nUPyAfm0S0CnUb2fXrJkRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pequeño local, no esta a pie de calle pero tiene un fácil acceso.
Local bien decorado simple y minimalista. Buen hilo musical para relajarse y tomarte algo.
Tienen menú de los productos de la carta y con mucha variedad de productos.
El cafe es muy bueno.
Esta muy bien para parar tomar algo sano y seguir con tú dia.
Servicio atento y rápido","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVZpGKfU_FSvhA5ZxJicSC&fid=0x0:0xc8982e386d0e9499"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnBk-Jmg6Bys4VJxrHqIGEatWvEcjIOaOivKNT_VHuf-RNmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El lugar es simplemente precioso: la decoración está cuidada al detalle, donde Cada rincón tiene su toque especial, perfecto para disfrutar de un café tranquilo o una fría cerveza.

Las tostas son una auténtica delicia, crujientes, bien presentadas y con ingredientes frescos y sabrosos. Se nota el mimo con el que preparan cada plato. Mi favorita fue la de aguacate con huevo poché, aunque todas tienen un toque casero que las hace irresistibles.

El personal es amable y el servicio rápido, lo que hace que la experiencia sea aún mejor. Ideal para desayunar, merendar o simplemente pasar un rato agradable con buena comida, música y la compañía correcta.

Sin duda, un sitio al que volveré muchas veces!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2uZvf_Vjm_LkKfVx_c3Az&fid=0x0:0xc8982e386d0e9499"],"When":"2025-10-7"}]

[{"Name":"Julio Cesar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeZE8rmKRWccU1iiVpwNgJVQAWrjbr7aUz2TdEkrU-OnpAqp7u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cuando tengas hambre y no sepas dónde ir, te recomiendo Cafes Pozo sin dudarlo. Está súper cerca de Rejas, en una ubicación que no puede ser más céntrica y accesible. Lo que más me gusta es que siempre que hablo con gente que va habitualmente, no paran de recomendarlo por la calidad de su carta. Tienen chefs que son auténticos especialistas en pasta y pizza, todo hecho con mucho mimo. Y no puedes irte sin probar su café, es famoso por algo, ¡está delicioso!

Otro punto a su favor son los precios. La verdad es que te llevas una grata sorpresa cuando ves la cuenta, porque no son nada elevados para la calidad que ofrecen; están totalmente en línea con lo que se espera, o incluso por debajo. Además, es muy práctico que acepten pagos con tarjeta, así no tienes que ir preocupado de si llevas efectivo suficiente.

Eso sí, como es tan popular y siempre está lleno –cosa que no me extraña–, es muuuy aconsejable que reserves antes de ir. La decoración es sencilla pero acogedora, y se nota que es un sitio muy familiar, del que todo el mundo sale contento y con muy buen sabor de boca. Para terminar, si quieres hacerte una idea de lo que te espera, échale un vistazo a sus redes sociales: las fotos de los platos son increíbles y te entran unas ganas de ir…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alejandro Rodríguez - Romeral Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBtGc-nWdEsTT13t8t1dxEz-mPm0blN6SzMlLZjJgweIIOSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Café de primera valoración calidad a buen precio. [{"Name":"Fred H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgOBiv1ReFBjbSP5-HIEXTF7e6cTMtc9OGT_huLAFx6ItRatTI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The menu of the day is not good. I was the first customer for lunch. It took them extremely long to prepare my food then they charged me 1€ extra for the plastic to take away (while all the other restaurants usually have a cheaper takeaway price as you do not block a table). They should mention that they charge 1€ for the plastic containers when ordering the food.

They told me the soup is homemade but it did not taste homemade to me. They served the takeaway soup in a plastic glass for cold drinks so the plastic became soft (unhealthy). The cordon bleus are not homemade, I believe I can buy the same at the supermarket. The dessert, an apple tart, was very basic but at least it was homemade.

I do not recommend to have lunch there, there are much better places in this area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhsODh_gE&fid=0x0:0x547252caedec5eef"],"When":"2023-2-27"},{"Name":"Etienne Maricq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjYkr1lsQz_EAW1VKP7X6ZU_hf2k9m0r66YrT3MF7BR3nnEe8n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Having a café con leche in this industrial commercial district of south Madrid.

[{"Name":"Artur Matzka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU21RL9_GSWiwiMnMPKg0e2z_0NgJ-aSdiQxiW4JTn0XxiBXD9H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Macros Mastered — Personal-Chef Experience in Madrid 🍽️💪
Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Short & Sweet: Fresh, healthy, delicious food tailored to your exact macros. The owner makes sticking to your diet plan effortless —  every ingredient weighed, calories and macros counted, and custom versions prepared to match my between-competition meal plan. Meals were clean, flavorful, and right on schedule; it felt like having my own restaurant and personal chef with me.

Worth noting: the pastries and cakes are also available and looked and smell incredible. I couldn’t try them this time, but they’re first on my list when I’m back after competition season.

💡 If you want to stick to your diet, need fresh, healthy food, are on bodybuilding prep, or simply want to enjoy the magic flavors of clean cooking with family and friends — you can have it all here.

Gonna miss you, Juan. Thank You for everything 💪","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzsUvRQGIxteiVX40ZvUaV&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Jon Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItzvBEvcDAM9LY-_KyRIfG4YIA_eYrV6qKuKkiBUsecgkrOg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Started at the Melia hotel across the street and my wife picked this restaurant out for lunch after arrival.  Wow, amazing food and during our week stay are here 6 times😁

The service was efficient and the food cooked perfectly.  The fondue in the bread bowl was absolutely incredible.  It is huge though, so bring friend or plan to take good home.  My favorite if the week was the chimmichiri beef.  Cooked perfectly and so flavorful.  My 10yo son lived the honey glazed chicken and ate it each time we were there.
They have great coffee, but the standout dessert is the cheesecake.  Housemade creamy and delicious, and not too sweet.  I want a piece writing this review.
I highly recommend heading over the Horizon when you are in Madrid.

Another standout was the pork belly which we had later in the week.  Crispy and juicy at the same time or table of 12 devoured three orders in record time.

They list themselves as health food, but they mean they cook healthy food, location the best food sources for their restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXKp6CCT7d3lEtyye9UFAc&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"SARA MOHAMMED","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhIAT3ke2JVQc50QOQxUQ1Bvnxva-wCrQKewbHNNJkk6d67B5F_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the best breakfast during our staying in Madrid 😋😋😍😍
The Spanish omelet extremely yummy 👍🏻👍🏻
The coffee with sparkles of chocolate love it 😍
The view next to our table cozy and comfy🩷🩷

Special thanks to Yukari for her beautiful smile and the hospitality 🩷

Chef Julio you are the best 🫡🫡🫡","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANViQSXkqJK33RtR54vs1R&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Duncan Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6tXMac3jjDZx5dbF93hXJ94vOFmZnkS9uZ671hivf4GLcmZvKDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have just eaten at Horizon based on the reviews, rating of 4.8.  Without a doubt one of the worst meals I can ever remember.  My cod was absolutely full of bones in every mouthful.  My extra side of sweet potato was rock hard.  I was offered a free coffee when I expressed my disappointment.  The machine coffee was the highlight of this expensive meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKEIK4VO-ZAM8hiUJj7PFk&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"dino lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLF-fzOQGQBkWQO-dWdQWT9ctSm7FAp4_ZlEzzYlMi1FfkY-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly staff, especially Katy ^_^ nice and quiet environment, a good place to have brunch with reasonable price and great quality","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdUvVjjhpVXgrh5-oVmQTk&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Florin Tulbure","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhI0i16cdXobk89a65wGLp-fTa2BKRccieWEWyroIweCzPVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was great, they served verry fast, the atmosphere was great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCu4bVN_EVAEEMc00xIm6f7&fid=0x0:0x840d36afccf53705"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Nora Ten Broeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKL5ACo8dURmnE8wOf5liT_set8_G6_e01fzXLnrz32YIL7OQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stayed at the Five-Star Melia Castilla across the street, while that was good; the Horizon was amazing! I just want to stay close to the airport so i book hotel in Barjas area. The hotel lady told me to wait for couple of hours as checking time starts at 2:00 pm. I asked her if there is any coffee shop around she recommend me to visit Obrador de Cardin. I would like 200 meters from my accommodation and there i see this beautiful place packed with people and it was quite packed at breakfast hours. To my surprise i managed to get seat. And I was amazed by the energy that people at Obrador have they greet you with most amazing Hola. The lady walked to me and asked for my order i told her I don’t speak Spanish. She said her english is bad but believe me she was good at English. I ordered a coffee and a bread toast with tomatoes and it was delicious. I sit at obrador for 5 hours straight and nobody has asked me to leave. Internet was good and it was free for all customer. For two coffee and two toast i paid 5 euros which is pretty nominal. I will request everyone to visit obrador during there stay in Barjas area. This place is now my go to place for sure.
Kudos to Obrador Team
And btw grab a bread as there bread is so popular as i have seen at least 50 plus customers bought bread in less then hours.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nico Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgDXU_f_4IPiIrvnVu9aRFIIoZ8MPw620fnetrdn847FYPpZ-wXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very generous portions for the price. Loved it. We had tortilla and 1/2 ración of patatas and chorizo and padrón peppers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAgbzgvAE&fid=0x0:0xc4acdf4104b83ff9"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Leyla Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRRqWVVayrXd3cklz_GCDHxrZNXYS3scDMJBuqBXdnNmpCvA5E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No le doy 5 estrellas, la sencilla y razón es qué el dueño del bar no es de aquí  cuando le pasa algo, uno ahí no puede opinar porque te saca de su bar, las chicas son majas, los aperitivos y calidad de precios con la bebida están bien. Es pequeño por dentro, sí vas en tiempo de frío es imposible estar porque se llena.
Por todo lo demás excelente","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSHCsNuwuIJrUY_iACO4ZV&fid=0x0:0xc4acdf4104b83ff9"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"El Justiciero de Google","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwHwsuDb1UJSrCsVBsJnfI8pVqwt0SewnyfnfR2Ogna5DCUW4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este bar del Barrio del Pilar es una auténtica joya para quienes disfrutan de las buenas tapas y el ambiente relajado. Cuenta con una terraza amplia ideal para tomar una cerveza bien tirada mientras se disfruta del aire libre. Uno de sus grandes atractivos es que con cada consumición ofrecen una tapa generosa y variada, desde croquetas hasta embutidos y empanadillas, lo que convierte cada visita en una experiencia gastronómica muy completa.

Además, si vas con hambre, tienen una carta de raciones bastante amplia y a precios muy ajustados. Las tostas y los huevos rotos son especialmente recomendables por su sabor y presentación. Todo esto lo convierte en una opción perfecta para tapear con amigos sin gastar demasiado.

Como punto negativo, el interior del local es bastante pequeño, lo que puede ser un inconveniente en días de lluvia o frío. Aun así, el servicio y la calidad general compensan con creces ese detalle.

En definitiva, si estás por el Barrio del Pilar, este bar es una parada obligatoria. Buena comida, buen precio y mejor ambiente. Muy recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBm9GD8HOpJJGTAR4BWWmEj&fid=0x0:0xc4acdf4104b83ff9"],"When":"2025-7-5"},{"Name":"Andrea Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlKeLQNs_RiMMEfxIs3ROCLAIdhiiKWnjMcyvYnYxh25-qJTyn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ambientazo un sábado a mediodía. ¿La razón? Cerveza fría, precio razonable, tapa abundante (muy abundante), y servicio amable, cercano y efectivo. Todas las terrazas de al lado estaban vacías y la de este bar llena; que se lo hagan mirar. Nos tiramos más de 6 horas allí porque estábamos agustisimo. Cerveza, raciones, copas, cafés y la cuenta no llegó a 130€ entre 5 personas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXw8iWsAE&fid=0x0:0xc4acdf4104b83ff9"],"When":"2024-10-19"},{"Name":"Novita El viajero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4uX-rCozBB3oJHy4l9gXm4ybJtKWCepYSdQFbJClUqgCnmPAf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cerveza muy fría y siempre ponen buena tapa. [{"Name":"Spencer Henkel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWF7Jj5D4fwJn-zrr2cuK4Ls0NM2hJDuQCLj2Qw6moro6zFT34=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Since learning of the opening of Stop back in November, this has been my primary go-to cafetería, the perfect "stop" (pun intended) in the morning on my way to work. Very friendly staff, welcoming, chatty, like a small family, and they have helped me greatly in practicing my Spanish (I'm from the States). I feel very much at home both on the terrace and inside the establishment, for whatever time of day and whatever season of the year. Stop's location is also very ideal for visibility and mobility, being at the crossroads of three of my major bus lines. If ever you find yourself in the neighborhood, I highly recommend a visit to Cafetería Restaurante Stop!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ8vbgeQ&fid=0x0:0xe6b671eda1e345b7"],"When":"2023-7-14"},{"Name":"Cindy Idrobo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuzDyiAXkdFPp_re-iwOatJYymN59GAFySJl2z2Ag4Sn-oqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cozy place

Great experience

Which is not something usual in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"EUSEBIO RD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkvgGjIU7sFeMeCR_c5y0tXM2BN7D4S49j-EAu5swik2AU3eI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"En Tim Hortons de IFEMA MADRID, las pantallas el menú cuesta 5,30 € y en caja te cobran 7,30 €. Dos euros más. Cuando lo reclamas te dicen que no pueden hacer nada.

Esto es engañar al cliente. Están cobrando precios distintos a los que anuncian.

Además, promocionan la tarjeta Áreas pero el personal no sabe usarla y no aplican el descuento.

Desorganización total y sensación de estafa. No vuelvo.
Habrá que reclamar a consumo por estas malas prácticas y engaños al público, cuanto dinero sacan robando 2 euros por cliente? Miles de euros…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0bT8Zztmf4yghosIZ6sGh&fid=0x0:0x9ea8d1bfc93668f7"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Jorge Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHxiDc44UspVBsQxOqTEb4sCwV4G7AZvZ4rjiXYU3oCjrUuohg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cuidado estafa! Pedi un menú que incluía café L + bocadillo de tortilla por 9,65€ y me sirvieron un café M cuando lo reclamé me dijeron que con el menú daban café M. cuando les dije que en el cartel indican que es L se hicieron como que no me entendían.

No lo recomiendo, mucho cuidado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmZjLLFljwoBi61dw7Umpj&fid=0x0:0x9ea8d1bfc93668f7"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"ivan gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp1jS_LE8kJ-K2EtUigoeQc47-koMFGCQyuTz6c8TcnqGsYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Estando de evento en Ifema aprovechamos para tomar un café, pedí un latte vainilla y la verdad que no encontré el sabor a vainilla por ningún lado. Por otro lado, un compañero le pidió un café sin matcha o algo así y como no era lo habitual no se lo querían poner, por otro lado, para tener que estar acostumbrados al volumen de gente, servicio super lento. De hecho, pedimos un croissant y una cookie, y esta nunca llegó, ni la apuntaron, ni la cobraron ni la sirvieron","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELSl-bmK7ufC9gE&fid=0x0:0x9ea8d1bfc93668f7"],"When":"2025-5-29"},{"Name":"Sofía Gómez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtQa-A0azzTCLDS-j1QASUeLlLowBbAaEafVP5tfbzBSKSngx5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Primera vez que me aseguran que el chaii no lleva té negro, he pagado más de 5€ por un vaso de leche con un punch de sirope. He dicho amablemente a la camarera, que si no se le había olvidado el té y ella de malas formas (entiendo que por el agobio que tenía al estar ella sola atendiendo a todo el mundo) me ha contestado que esta bebida nunca lleva té. Si la bebida se llama te chaii latte…
Tampoco tenían leche sin lactosa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI4J-LuAE&fid=0x0:0x9ea8d1bfc93668f7"],"When":"2025-3-29"}]

Si buscas un sitio de desayunos o para tomar algo es tu sitio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg3syWC0BKZfLdHBGfO3SwX_NKKvmRXf2Z37uXYNaQzh5Ntx4q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Para mi ha sido de los peores sitios en los que me han atendido en mi vida, de verdad, porque no puedo poner menos de una estrella...Fuimos a tomar algo, nos sentamos en una mesa llena de platos sucios, esperando que en algún momento los retiraran, lo normal vamos. Vinieron a tomarnos nota, sin llevarse los platos, por lo que se lo comentamos a la camarera, que al cabo de veinte minutos vino y retiró un vaso, dejando todo lo demás ahí. El resto de mesas tenían tapa, todos menos nosotros, volvimos a pedir otra bebida, que nuevamente vino sin tapa y los vasos y platos sucios seguían acumulándose. Al cabo del rato, ya indignados con el trato, decidimos quejarnos y la camarera casi nos come vivos. Horrible, no lo recomiendo para nada. Qué asco!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsrcaq8gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x48bd70209f13b183"],"When":"2020-2-10"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Valentín Pérez Cuevas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsDxHeVEm2Y0xOrMxEbMmoxuLHxaD06LCcft69yPfwGt92c8Uh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La cafetería más grande cerca del hospital es un robo a mano armada.

Cuando llegas tienes que dirigirte a por un bandeja donde vas cogiendo algunos artículos (muchos de ellos sin precio). Otro artículos te lo sirve el personal, que es el activo más valioso que tiene la cafetería. Se hacen cola y entonces abren una segunda línea. Los precios de los artículos son desorbitados. El bocadillo de jamón ibérico no contiene jamón ibérico en su lonchas casi inexistentes. Lo único asequible es el café. Eso y que regalan agua fría cosas de agradecer.

Cuando vas a sentarte hay muchísimas mesas compartidas y otras individuales. Hay personal recogiendo las bandejas pero te dejan un carro por si quieres facilitarles el trabajo.

En muchas ocasiones hay gente pidiendo dinero o dejando unos souvenir para que les des algo de dinero. No me molestan pero después del atraco de la cafetería poco te queda para dar a esta gente.

Es una vergüenza que al lado de un hospital  la cafetería tenga unos precios tan abusivos cuando saben que no hay apenas competencia.

No volveremos, si podemos evitarlo

Recomiendo como alternativa la cafetería más pequeña a la salida de la Renfe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMCRPDkHM3muymFyuMecV9&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"D3yssy D3yssy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJM1UpPjXm8Rd2maigEKNZ3qMDS5vLH66v75Td-Vl6dWGZeTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cafeteria nefasta, camarero nefasto un poco antipático y encima el café Aguado no es café bueno, se lo he pedido más oscuro y me vuelve a echar del mismo dispensador que había echado el primero sin cambiarlo, que asco de churros recalentados a 50 céntimo cada uno, es un abuso y no me los he podido ni comer, no volveré y las cafeterías de los hospitales deberían ser más baratas y los productos de mejor calidad. Tanto pacientes como personal sanitario. De vergüenza todo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alba Granados","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRaF4qA-h0hSXzwGtsmqU5NJ_jMYBV05yHi2uEt5HO6r8jaIC9CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El local es grande con muchas mesas y mucho espacio, cuando fuimos hacía mucho ruido apenas se podía hablar tranquilamente y para ir al baño hay que pedir una llave la comida que ofrecen no tiene buena pinta deja mucho que desear. Está bien para tomar un café y nada más","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV45q-c9BMOdEB2doPQLKO&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Amanda Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTnpbwRloCx9HmK2DhSSQG3u98Bx2dGSRlTasr5lpMCqIF_hg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Actualización

El menú diario son 11,10

No entiendo una puntuación tan baja. El menú diario es muy barato (10,35) y además supersaludable. Hoy tenían de primero (a elegir) ensalada, judías verdes o ratatouille, y de segundo boquerones o pavo asado. No le deseo a nadie visita al hospital para tener que comer aquí, pero en caso de que así sea, la cafetería es un lugar muy correcto y eficiente. Me gusta el formato de largas mesas donde comensales desconocidos se sientan lo suficientemente cerca como para poner en práctica las formulas de cortesía que se están perdiendo: que aproveche, ¿Le importa si me siento aquí?. En un lugar tan frío como un hospital, uno tiende a buscar el calor humano en cualquier sitio","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRp7PY1gE&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2023-5-5"},{"Name":"Luna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeLBHa-rt_ht0s494ZZFP1a9GubwDvIhPaLOGP8F3cYx5MidZVjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pésimo servicio (como se puede ver en la foto el café derramado al servirlo y los croissant super pequeños), poca calidad, precio muy elevado, ambiente bullicioso y poco acogedor.
Se aprovechan del sitio en el que están, pero aviso a navegantes: las cafeterías de alrededor tienen mejores precios , mejor ambiente y mejor servicio.
Tampoco ponen precio de desayuno como en cualquiera de alrededor, sino que lo  cobran por separado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICN55mNag&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2024-1-18"},{"Name":"Alejandro Ramirez Valencia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVe6pg6vqCKfJC7IImfgWnuOCdBqeqJHzqWJdBATA1Tbi7c4c0eA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es la Primera Vez que Desayuno en esta Cafetería.  Me gustó...el Precio es Razonable....pensaba que era Caro y no...... Café con Leche y Tostada.....3,50 €. La Tostada estaba muy Rica, fresca y Crujiente...el Tomate  si no me gustó Mucho....parece que tenía un poco de  Agua. Atención Rápida.....

Recomendable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDntY3FEw&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2024-10-8"},{"Name":"ENANAIARMJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl7dC-vsvJmndPj4WjI-i_mvoRghUm_hjEUo6NhUNqfFG6uqcS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He estado ingresada en el hospital pero he salido con mi familia a tomar  algo en la cafetería, me parece inaceptable la calidad de los productos, tales como la tortilla, seca y de 1,5 cms (aprox) que nos sirvieron. Pero habitualmente, las mañanas las colas para desayunar son largas y descontroladas. El personal con caras largas y muy desagradables. Agradecería que Santa Gloría, la cafetería de al lado tuviese el mismo espacio que ellos, porque creo que no iban tener clientes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgbRXCGNpvfSgZ7OSiauheHkrIPyY1g1NronKEJk53I6RS0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"No está mal. Tienen máquina de refrescos refill, pero no se puede rellenar el refresco, un sinsentido. Lo que sí está bien es que tienen jarras para rellenarse agua del grifo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID32unpiAE&fid=0x0:0xee9297822f054ba0"],"When":"2024-11-14"}]

[{"Name":"Jordiana Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLlDN2eOvNdObJFWegxmwPm59pYT6GIQcFGvT-2I1xlIIYP4ST=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There’s something special about Claudio Cookies.
It’s not trying to be “New York style.” It’s not trying to be anyone else. It’s a whole new kind of cookie, crunchy, golden, buttery, and full of flavor.

Claudio, the owner, even tells you exactly how to enjoy them: “If you want it softer, dip it in milk. If you want it warmer, give it a few seconds in the microwave.” He’s got you covered🙌

This place isn’t just about cookies it’s about laughing, sharing, and leaving happy.
Original. Fun. Real. That’s Claudio Cookies☺️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJf7x-Cq3a0btRcor6fDHF&fid=0x0:0x58ef0719d81db978"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Sabina Chincoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKv11MsCOiUWs64toVqZPe78Ph12c2QeQHYeutMINRgIV1-fw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Claudio Cookies breaks the rules and that’s exactly why it stands out. This isn’t your “New York style” or any other copycat trend. Claudio Cookies has its own signature style: golden, crunchy, perfectly balanced, and absolutely addictive. If you’re searching for a soft, gooey cookie keep walking. The owner himself will tell you: “If you want it moist, dip it in milk. If you want it warm, pop it in the microwave.” It’s that simple.
Every cookie here is made to be enjoyed your way crispy, bold, and unforgettable. One bite and you’ll understand: this is not just a cookie. It’s a statement.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAY0kWlQv0T3bea7JFNvGlo&fid=0x0:0x58ef0719d81db978"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Yisset Ovalles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULgY7IUDuwgbUjJj_edIkc_8IPzGysmQCQjw5ktVgEHpoEVuA1LQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best cookie course and more that you could find if you want to start your own business. 추천해주셨던 버거도 정말 맛있고 가끔 아침에도 들렀었는데 한 번도 실망한 적 없는 곳.

관광지랑은 멀어서 한국 사람이 올만한 곳인지는 모르겠지만 혹시 이 근처 들를 일 있다면 꼭 가주세요!

Y tienen buenos precios.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4ldnxhwE&fid=0x0:0x4e962e6ac424bf04"],"When":"2018-4-26"},{"Name":"Raquel GR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWZb9kE_mexnXchDPTEU-W27y1isWIOwzTAVZmx5lToDKOYDs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Espectacular sitio si trabajas por la zona o estás de paso (hamburguesa de Roquefort y Angus) comimos dos personas por 16€ haciéndolo menú por 2€ más.

El personal muy amable.
Volveré para probar la variedad de hamburguesas que tienen gourmet entre ellas la de carne de canguro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDuy9mGPQ&fid=0x0:0x4e962e6ac424bf04"],"When":"2022-8-29"}]

Me gusta mucho el ambiente y la comida de aquí.
Mi amiga y yo pedimos una combinación del menú y todo estaba riquísimo.
La Tita fue la primera cafetería que probé en España, y le tengo mucho cariño porque me dio una experiencia muy bonita.
－
6月底時我去了西班牙一趟，在清晨剛抵達機場的我和朋友完全沒做功課，隨機找了一家機場附近的早餐店。La Tita翻譯成中文的話應該可以是阿姨早餐吧哈哈哈 超可愛💖
這家店有提供一個麵包搭配飲品的服務 我印象中只要2€ 滿便宜的
麵包很大很好吃 拿鐵也很好喝
這是一家很在地的早餐店 露天座位有很多帶小狗出來散步的居民 雖然我們坐在室內但感覺也是很融入當地
我很喜歡這間店給我超級在地的氛圍： 看著坐在terraza抽菸 旁邊坐著黃金獵犬的大叔、跟客人聊天的店員…因為是第一間品嚐的早餐店所以在我心裡有一個很特別的位置 服務人員也都很親切 所以我對La Tita有很好的印象與感受
-
Muchas Gracias
Recomendación desde Taiwán 🇹🇼","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArwZh8gdnnnSm-giJlpdia&fid=0x0:0xbbdd880a57509a6f"],"When":"2025-12-17"}]

She was in so much hurry even though there was literally no one behind us in a queue. While paying by cash, we mentioned we will give exact change as we didn’t want coins back but she went ahead and gave us the coins, printed the receipt and then said she can’t make any changes now. When asked for paperbag without handles which is supposed to be free, she asked to buy the bag which I denied and asked for the one which is free. She then took one out and handed it over to me grudgingly.
Starbucks should do better and hire better people who understand customer service and not there to scam people with money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLF6kWhtgb7PKinsLXrkNrlqImDA-kQHCVbaNdRKw8k-EB8vA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They were so rushed that none of our order was heard correctly but it sure was charged right. The drip coffee was awful like water with essence of coffee. Spent almost 30 euros for trash coffee and sandwich that I asked not to be warmed so I could remove the cheese so could only eat half. [{"Name":"Peter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEv6LUu79ioxkfCn68tTn1mtjUJWaVLSxy3FhdESaiBVkZDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst double espresso ever!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"joaquin gonzalo de la puente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOaHIPezcT4JuPCTKWSl5gRxFN0TH3KxY_5zmaG21_Tw-rPftX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"R’SPIRO es un lugar maravilloso para tomarse un café con amigos o con tu mascota.🐶

Se encuentra en el centro comercial Caleido pegado a las cuatro torres.

Su café calidad-precio está muy bien, además que si pagas 30 céntimos más podrás probar su café de especialidad. También sirven uno de los mejores bikinis de Madrid.

Es un sitio muy bueno para la gente que busca calidad, aunque para las personas sibaritas todavía está un peldaño por debajo de otras cafeterías de especialidad.✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9pO3ZFA&fid=0x0:0x55f7130b2b811a4e"],"When":"2024-3-2"},{"Name":"Pache","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZ8Y47-chqST0miTzEv3-i_GUmTXGStFujW2HfI1xA4nRFbu95eQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food truck en el centro comercial caleido. Está en medio entre la Máquina del Caleido y el restaurante Secrets. De los mejores cafes de la zona. Te puedes sacar una tarjeta de fidelidad para obtener cafés gratis. Tienes opciones de dulce y salado. Dispone de una pequeña terraza en la que se está de lujo en días como hoy. Lo peor los tiempos de espera, a pesar de que los chicos trabajan bien y rápido","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_jKvK1AE&fid=0x0:0x55f7130b2b811a4e"],"When":"2025-1-13"},{"Name":"María","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLysljyuwgAaq2irTtCHUQFz3UwE_ZmSN-QGHocksGdRb9i-B4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mejor lugar para hacer una pausa. Thanks from Canada!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phil D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVEH00bRJOhQ0xpGnrNi7gfG8pdf6s8Oiy4GGf8RdZd38K-Sg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are an English couple who recently visited this bar. The proprietor Carlos and his staff could not have made us more welcome. The (free) tapas were great probably as good as any in the area.

On our last night before leaving for the UK they even reserved a table for us.

So I totally disagree with the previous comment that they don’t somehow want to serve ‘tourists’ if we ever return to Madrid this is the first bar we will go to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A Cascallana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlym64wA43MPQPvTEw-xFF8yf_8B73LOm5x64VwGZ16RVcpAIk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the only authentical "tapas bar" in the neibourhood. Very reasonably priced.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Akash Singh Chahal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZHaUj05Q00m3_Ok97n0R13dP1Ws8Oce-s8lidkXUJQVE3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Small community bar, good beer and tapa","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"arnau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZkPTStQkb0IHOwsj51GvB4QIEnUIZlRtgIofPnjvUEihjIUPdfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio auténtico de los que ya no quedan. La atención es súper amable, te hacen sentir como en casa desde el primer momento. El local es acogedor, con muy buen ambiente, buena cerveza y buenas raciones. Sin duda, si vuelvo a Madrid, volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgeob-o2WpSgKtlJfj0VG-&fid=0x0:0x8b09f7395309646c"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Doris Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKrCCMvWHhlPm2sqzw5UvEfb6ufj5k-VQpPzJXLUFJTtY9mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"很好吃，这家店的火腿味道非常好吃！
老板不太会英文，但我们碰到好心的顾客帮忙翻译和推荐点餐。
我和朋友随意点了两个食物，都有很多土豆，老板提醒了我们，说如果不太饿就只保留一个，吃了之后再决定要不要加点，结果就是一份食物我们都没有吃完。
店里的顾客应该大多是附近的住户，非常local，物美价廉，推荐给路过的中国朋友们！","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQvNGwqwE&fid=0x0:0x8b09f7395309646c"],"When":"2025-3-9"}]

Pedimos un menú que nos costó 16 € bebida incluida y postre y en el cual podías degustar arroz caldoso con bogavante entre otras cosas y de segundo 1 entrecot espectacular","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCx9UEqI0FLh5lD2ebxiB-4&fid=0x0:0xc42d25ab823ac319"],"When":"2025-7-15"},{"Name":"Elizabeth Amoedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyGSTDD0GETd0iicLjcNRTHdpuspsCX8GZHU2BoP7ojPCueLx0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Volveré.
El ambiente era muy tranquilo.
El camarero me atendió muy amablemente y muy rápido. Estaba atento según iba terminando los platos.
Me pedí un menú.
El primer plato estaba bien, era pasta y tenía buen sabor, algo sencillo.
El segundo plato fue una maravilla, carrillada con una salsa que estaba deliciosa y las patatas crujientes y en su punto.

El trato fue súper rápido y exquisito; los camareros trabajan con una agilidad admirable sin perder la amabilidad en ningún momento. El café estaba excelente y la comida igual de buena, con una presentación muy cuidada.

El local está decorado con un estilo moderno y acogedor, creando un ambiente perfecto tanto para desayunar allí como para tomar algo con calma. Además de sus desayunos, cuentan con una gran variedad de bollería para llevar, bocadillos salados y opciones para todos los gustos. También ofrecen zumos, tés, chocolate con churros y porras, todo con muy buena calidad.

En definitiva, un sitio al que da gusto volver. Lo recomiendo totalmente y sin duda repetiré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKIxTPbAd5wqTaaneC8xMF&fid=0x0:0x363afdeeacd0739b"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Ruslán Rezinkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzy8qGFi3e-iHBE1PScVIoBDFDItyfzEbWoxIge0fmpS2dVZbE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buen sitio, cafe y postres son muy ricos, y ambiente tranquilo, personal es muy amable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB237lv0KuSs8fE4rRUPhzg&fid=0x0:0x363afdeeacd0739b"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Yorbe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMThFR34AFqrPJweNW8BNYI_MFJAQ_0GRcwAxYVqCekLDxZj9DHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente cafetería. Suelen tener churros y dulces pero fuimos algo tarde. La cafetería es pequeña, solo tiene 4 mesitas y la barra pero está ventilada con la puerta abierta lo que se agradece. La camarera muy amable y profesional. El precio bien, acorde a la calidad y zona.
